▼ EPIC-0001 Planned Foundation & Infrastructure Medium 1.1 MVP $4,000 projected
US-0001 Planned High As a developer, I want a Next.js 14 App Router project scaffolded with TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Supabase client, so that all subsequent epics can build on a consistent foundation. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0001 Next.js 14 App Router project boots locally with `npm run dev` and renders a placeholder page
  • ○ AC-0002 TypeScript strict mode enabled; `tsconfig.json` extends Next.js defaults
  • ○ AC-0003 Tailwind CSS configured with PostCSS pipeline; sample utility class renders
  • ○ AC-0004 shadcn/ui CLI initialized; `components/ui` directory exists with at least Button installed
  • ○ AC-0005 `@supabase/ssr` and `@supabase/supabase-js` installed; browser + server client factories in `lib/supabase/`
  • ○ AC-0006 `.env.local.example` documents `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`, `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN`
US-0002 Planned High As a developer, I want a Supabase project provisioned with PostgreSQL and email auth enabled, so that we have a backend ready for schema migrations and authentication. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0007 Supabase project created (cloud or local via `supabase start`)
  • ○ AC-0008 Email + password auth provider enabled in Supabase Auth settings
  • ○ AC-0009 Project URL and anon key documented in `.env.local`
  • ○ AC-0010 `supabase/config.toml` checked into repo for reproducible local dev
US-0003 Planned High As a player, I want the FDgolf — built with AI/RUN app chrome on every authenticated page, so that the brand identity is consistent across the entire app. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0011 `AppChrome` component renders dark forest-green (#0e2818) header bar
  • ○ AC-0012 Header displays "FDgolf" with green "FD" mark (#6ee7a0) and white "golf"
  • ○ AC-0013 Header displays "built with AI/RUN" tagline with AI/RUN logo on the right
  • ○ AC-0014 AppChrome is responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
  • ○ AC-0015 Used in the root `app/layout.tsx` so all routes inherit it
US-0004 Planned High As a player, I want to log in with email and password and stay logged in across page navigation, so that I don't have to re-authenticate constantly during my round. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0016 `/login` page renders email + password form with FDgolf branding
  • ○ AC-0017 Successful login redirects to intended route (default `/`)
  • ○ AC-0018 Failed login displays an error message without exposing whether the email exists
  • ○ AC-0019 Session persists via cookies set by Supabase SSR client
  • ○ AC-0020 `/logout` route clears the session and redirects to `/login`
  • ○ AC-0021 Next.js middleware refreshes the session on every request
US-0005 Planned High As a developer, I want the complete DB schema migrated, so that all subsequent feature work has the tables it needs. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0022 Migration creates tables: tournaments, courses, holes, players, user_roles, tournament_registrations, teams, rounds, shots, shot_edits, shot_attestations, hole_scores, team_hole_scores, clubs, tournament_clubs, score_disputes
  • ○ AC-0023 All enums defined: tournament_format, tournament_start_style, tournament_status, role_type, registration_status, round_status, shot_outcome, rehit_origin_type, hole_score_status, club_type, dispute_status
  • ○ AC-0024 Foreign keys and unique constraints match the data model in design spec section 4
  • ○ AC-0025 `teams.team_size` int column with check constraint (2 <= team_size <= 5)
  • ○ AC-0026 `shots.updated_at` defaults to now() and triggers update on row change
  • ○ AC-0027 Migration runs cleanly on a fresh database via `supabase db reset`
US-0006 Planned High As a developer, I want Row Level Security policies enforced on every table, so that tournament data is isolated and roles are respected. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0028 RLS enabled on every table created in US-0005
  • ○ AC-0029 Public read on tournaments, team_hole_scores, clubs (drives the public leaderboard and registration landing)
  • ○ AC-0030 Players can read self + own team members; admin bypass exists
  • ○ AC-0031 Players can write shots only during own round
  • ○ AC-0032 tournament_organizer scoped to their tournament_id
  • ○ AC-0033 Public payload on team_hole_scores includes player name + company only (no email, phone, year_of_birth, gender)
  • ○ AC-0034 SQL tests verify each policy with a non-privileged JWT
US-0007 Planned High As a player, I want a Mapbox map ready to render in the app, so that round tracking can show me my position and the hole pin. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0035 `mapbox-gl` and `react-map-gl` installed
  • ○ AC-0036 `MapView` component renders a Mapbox map centred on a passed-in lat/lng
  • ○ AC-0037 Custom golf-course-style URL configurable via env var with sensible default
  • ○ AC-0038 Component renders without errors when used in a Client Component
  • ○ AC-0039 Mapbox token loaded from `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN` env var; missing token shows a friendly fallback message instead of crashing
US-0008 Planned Medium As an admin, I want the master club list seeded with a standard golf bag, so that tournaments can use it out of the box. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0040 Seed migration inserts 15 standard clubs: Driver, 3-wood, 5-wood, 3-hybrid, 4–9 iron, PW, GW, SW, LW, Putter
  • ○ AC-0041 Each club has `club_type`, `default_loft_degrees` (except Putter), `display_order`, `is_active=true`
  • ○ AC-0042 Display order matches a real golfer's bag traversal (Driver → wedges → Putter)
  • ○ AC-0043 Seed is idempotent (re-running does not create duplicates)
▼ EPIC-0002 Planned Tournament Setup (Admin) Medium 1.1 MVP $5,200 projected
US-0009 Planned High As an admin, I want to create a tournament with basic info, so that registration and play can be configured around it. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0044 Form fields: name (req), starts_at date+time (req), venue (req), format (req, defaults Best Ball), start_style (req, defaults shotgun), holes_count (req, defaults 18)
  • ○ AC-0045 On submit, tournament is created with status=draft
  • ○ AC-0046 Slug auto-generated from name (lowercase, hyphens, ascii-only)
US-0010 Planned Medium As an admin, I want to override the auto-generated slug, so that the public URL matches the printed invitations. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0047 Slug field is editable on the basics step of the wizard
  • ○ AC-0048 Uniqueness check runs on blur; conflict shows inline error
  • ○ AC-0049 Only lowercase letters, digits, hyphens accepted
US-0011 Planned High As an admin, I want to enter par, yardage, and stroke index for each hole, so that the scoring engine and round map have the data they need. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0050 Course holes table renders one editable row per hole (1 to holes_count)
  • ○ AC-0051 Par values constrained to 3, 4, 5
  • ○ AC-0052 Stroke indices constrained to 1–18, unique within the course
  • ○ AC-0053 Total par computed and displayed at the bottom
  • ○ AC-0054 Save persists rows to the `holes` table linked to the tournament's course
US-0012 Planned Medium As an admin, I want a Granite Ridge GC preset to one-tap import, so that I don't hand-key 18 rows for the first tournament. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0055 "Import preset" button shows a list of available presets (at least Granite Ridge GC)
  • ○ AC-0056 Importing populates the 18-hole table with par, yardage, stroke index
  • ○ AC-0057 Admin can then edit any value before saving
US-0013 Planned High As an admin, I want to drop pin coordinates for each hole on a satellite map, so that the round tracking app can compute distance-to-pin. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0058 Satellite map renders for each hole at a sensible default zoom around the course
  • ○ AC-0059 Click on the map drops a pin; coordinates saved to holes.pin_lat / pin_lng
  • ○ AC-0060 Tee coordinates can also be dropped (separate mode)
  • ○ AC-0061 Progress bar shows N of 18 holes with pins set
  • ○ AC-0062 "Save and continue to next hole" button auto-advances
  • ○ AC-0063 Holes table shows pin status (Set or Missing) per hole
US-0014 Planned Medium As a player, I want a Mapbox Static API PNG snapshot stored per hole, so that distance-to-pin works even if the Mapbox tile API is rate-limited mid-round. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0064 On pin save, a request is made to Mapbox Static API for the hole region
  • ○ AC-0065 PNG is uploaded to Supabase Storage in `course-maps/{courseId}/hole-{n}.png`
  • ○ AC-0066 `holes.static_map_url` populated with the public URL
US-0015 Planned Medium As an admin, I want to pick which clubs from the master list are available in this tournament, so that I can enforce sponsor-supplied bags or simplified club lists. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0067 All master clubs listed with toggle controls; defaults to all-active
  • ○ AC-0068 Disabled clubs are excluded from the player's bag picker in pre-round setup
US-0016 Planned High As an admin, I want CIBC tournament sponsor logos (First Derivative, AI/Run) hardcoded for the first tournament, so that the public leaderboard ships on schedule. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0069 Logos shipped as static assets in `public/sponsors/`
  • ○ AC-0070 Tournament with slug `cibc-arc-2024` (or current first tournament's slug) shows both logos on public leaderboard
  • ○ AC-0071 Tournaments with other slugs show no sponsor logos until admin upload UI ships in Phase 2
US-0017 Planned High As an admin, I want a pre-flight checklist before activation, so that I don't open registration on a misconfigured tournament. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0072 Checklist shows green checks for: basics complete, all holes configured (par 72 or expected), all 18 pin coordinates set, slug verified unique
  • ○ AC-0073 Checklist shows amber reminders for: clubs configured, teams unassigned
  • ○ AC-0074 Activate button disabled until all green checks pass
  • ○ AC-0075 Live preview card shows what the public leaderboard banner will look like
US-0018 Planned High As an admin, I want buttons to move the tournament between statuses, so that I can open registration, start play, and close the tournament cleanly. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0076 From draft, "Open registration" moves status to registration_open
  • ○ AC-0077 From registration_open, "Start tournament" moves status to active
  • ○ AC-0078 From active, "Complete tournament" moves status to completed
  • ○ AC-0079 Paused status reachable via DB direct update; no UI in Phase 1
  • ○ AC-0080 Transitions are logged with timestamp and admin actor
US-0019 Planned Medium As an admin, I want the public registration URL displayed after activation, so that I can copy-paste it into the invite emails. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0081 Post-activation confirmation screen shows the URL `fdgolf.app/register/{slug}`
  • ○ AC-0082 Copy-to-clipboard button
US-0020 Planned Medium As an admin, I want to promote a player to tournament_organizer for a specific tournament, so that ops responsibility can be delegated without granting global admin. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0083 Admin can search any player and click "Make organizer" for a tournament
  • ○ AC-0084 user_roles row inserted with role=tournament_organizer and tournament_id=this_tournament
  • ○ AC-0085 Organizer can perform admin actions only on rows where tournament_id matches their role's tournament_id
▼ EPIC-0003 Planned Registration & Profile Medium 1.1 MVP $4,000 projected
US-0021 Planned High As a player, I want a tournament-branded invite landing page, so that I know what I'm signing up for before I start the form. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0086 Route `/register/{slug}` resolves the tournament from the slug
  • ○ AC-0087 Tournament name, venue, date, format displayed
  • ○ AC-0088 Sponsor logos visible (if configured)
  • ○ AC-0089 "Register" CTA and "I have an account" link
US-0022 Planned High As a player, I want to enter my personal info, so that the system knows who I am and how to contact me. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0090 Required fields: full name, title, company, email, mobile phone
  • ○ AC-0091 Optional fields explicitly labelled: year of birth (opt), gender (opt with prefer-not-to-say)
  • ○ AC-0092 Email format and phone format validated client-side and server-side
  • ○ AC-0093 Form values persist across step navigation
US-0023 Planned High As a player, I want to set a password with confirmation, so that I can log in next time. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0094 Two password fields with match validation
  • ○ AC-0095 Minimum 8 characters required in Phase 1 (Phase 2 strengthens)
  • ○ AC-0096 On submit, account created via Supabase Auth and player row inserted
  • ○ AC-0097 Player is auto-logged-in after account creation
US-0024 Planned High As a player, I want to choose my team and search for foursome members, so that I'm grouped with my colleagues for play. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0098 Team number selector lists 1 to tournament max teams
  • ○ AC-0099 Member search returns existing registered players by name or email
  • ○ AC-0100 "Add member" can add placeholder rows for non-registered players (email-only)
  • ○ AC-0101 tournament_registrations row created with team_id linked
US-0025 Planned High As a team captain, I want to register and assign all my team members in one flow, so that non-tech executives don't have to use the app themselves. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0102 During registration, player can check "I'm the team captain"
  • ○ AC-0103 Captain dashboard at /team/{teamId}/captain accessible post-login
  • ○ AC-0104 Captain can add new team members by name + email
  • ○ AC-0105 Each added member gets a signed invite link sent (stub email; logged to console in Phase 1)
  • ○ AC-0106 Invite link goes to a one-step "Set password" page with profile pre-filled by captain
US-0026 Planned Medium As a developer, I want a signed invite link generator and verifier, so that captain-issued invites are tamper-proof. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0107 Generator produces a JWT signed with Supabase service role key containing player_id and team_id
  • ○ AC-0108 Verifier rejects expired (>14 days) and invalid signatures
  • ○ AC-0109 Email send is stubbed in Phase 1 (logged); real send wired in Phase 2
US-0027 Planned Medium As a player, I want a profile page where I can view and edit my info, so that I can correct mistakes and see my tournament history. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0110 Route `/profile` shows current player's profile
  • ○ AC-0111 Editable: name, title, company, phone, year of birth, gender
  • ○ AC-0112 Read-only: email, handicap (Phase 2 edits handicap)
  • ○ AC-0113 Tournament history list (Phase 1 shows current tournament only)
US-0028 Planned Medium As a player, I want to request a password reset link, so that I can recover my account if I forget my password. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0114 `/forgot-password` accepts email, calls Supabase Auth reset
  • ○ AC-0115 Confirmation shown ("Check your inbox") regardless of whether the email exists
  • ○ AC-0116 Reset link from email opens `/reset-password?token=...` page where new password can be set
US-0029 Planned High As an admin, I want teams to support 2-, 3-, 4-, or 5-player sizes, so that drop-outs and oversized teams are handled cleanly. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0117 Team form has team_size selector 2-5 (default 4)
  • ○ AC-0118 Team detail UI says "Foursome" when team_size=4, "team of N" otherwise
  • ○ AC-0119 Best Ball calculation in EPIC-0006 uses actual team_size (not hardcoded 4)
▼ EPIC-0004 Planned Pre-Round Setup Medium 1.1 MVP $2,000 projected
US-0030 Planned High As a player, I want a tournament home page after I log in, so that I know my tee time, my team, and where to start. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0120 Countdown to starts_at displayed at top
  • ○ AC-0121 Team card with all members and their company
  • ○ AC-0122 Starting hole pin card with par, yardage
  • ○ AC-0123 "Start Round" primary CTA
  • ○ AC-0124 "View leaderboard" secondary link
US-0031 Planned Medium As a player, I want to confirm or remove clubs from my bag before I start, so that the picker shows only clubs I actually have. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0125 Tournament club list rendered as toggleable chips
  • ○ AC-0126 Defaults all on
  • ○ AC-0127 Tap to remove (greys out)
  • ○ AC-0128 Bag selection persisted to the round record
US-0032 Planned Low As a player, I want to confirm who goes first, so that the team starts in the right order. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0129 "Going on first" defaults to current player
  • ○ AC-0130 "Change" button opens picker with team members
US-0033 Planned High As a player, I want my round record created when I tap Start Round, so that subsequent shots have a parent. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0131 Inserts rounds row with status=in_progress, start_hole=tournament-assigned, started_at=now()
  • ○ AC-0132 Redirects to /round/{roundId} after creation
US-0034 Planned High As a player, I want a Begin Hole X entry screen, so that I see the map, distance, and club picker before I take my first shot. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0133 Map view shows hole pin, my GPS location, tee marker
  • ○ AC-0134 Distance-to-pin displayed (approx prefix)
  • ○ AC-0135 Club picker shows tournament bag with smart default (Driver on tee, otherwise last-used)
  • ○ AC-0136 "Start shot — capture GPS" CTA
▼ EPIC-0005 Planned Round Tracking Medium 1.1 MVP $7,200 projected
US-0035 Planned High As a player, I want the active hole map view to show my shot trail, so that I can see where I've been and where the pin is. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0137 Map shows fairway base layer from cached Mapbox Static URL
  • ○ AC-0138 Hole pin marker rendered
  • ○ AC-0139 Tee marker rendered
  • ○ AC-0140 Prior shots rendered as dashed lines + numbered markers
  • ○ AC-0141 Current player position pulsed in red
  • ○ AC-0142 Distance-to-pin overlay top-left
US-0036 Planned High As a player, I want to capture my GPS position when I take a shot, so that the system knows where I hit from. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0143 navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition called with high accuracy
  • ○ AC-0144 lat/lng captured to local state on Start Shot tap
  • ○ AC-0145 Selected club persisted with the shot draft
US-0037 Planned High As a player, I want four outcome buttons after I hit a shot, so that I can record what happened. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0146 Four buttons: In Play (neutral green), Sunk (filled green), Mulligan (amber), OOB (red)
  • ○ AC-0147 In Play / Sunk / Mulligan tap inserts shots row with appropriate stroke_count (1 / 1 / 0)
  • ○ AC-0148 OOB tap triggers the OOB rehit prompt (US-0038)
US-0038 Planned High As a player, I want to choose where my rehit comes from after OOB, so that the recorded GPS origin is accurate. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0149 Prompt offers "Rehit from OOB location" or "Rehit from prior position"
  • ○ AC-0150 OOB shot inserted with stroke_count=2 (1 for shot + 1 penalty)
  • ○ AC-0151 Follow-up shot's origin_lat/lng set to chosen rehit position
  • ○ AC-0152 rehit_from_shot_id and rehit_origin set on the follow-up shot
US-0039 Planned Medium As a player, I want Mulligan to not count as a stroke, so that I can reshoot without penalty. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0153 Mulligan outcome inserts shot with stroke_count=0
  • ○ AC-0154 Next shot's origin defaults to same location
US-0040 Planned High As a player, I want Shot Sunk to close the hole for me, so that the hole score is recorded and the turn moves on. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0155 Sunk outcome inserts shot with stroke_count=1
  • ○ AC-0156 Computes gross_score as sum of stroke_count on this hole
  • ○ AC-0157 Inserts/updates hole_scores row with status=provisional or final
  • ○ AC-0158 Triggers team_hole_scores recalc via EPIC-0006
US-0041 Planned High As a player, I want to edit any prior shot in this round, so that I can correct mistakes without admin help. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0159 Tap a shot in the map or hole summary to open the edit panel
  • ○ AC-0160 Editable: club, outcome, GPS origin
  • ○ AC-0161 Before/after states recorded in shot_edits audit table
  • ○ AC-0162 shots.updated_at and updated_by set on save
  • ○ AC-0163 Hole scores recalculated if outcome or stroke_count changed
US-0042 Planned Medium As a player, I want the foursome turn picker to auto-select the next player by farthest from pin, so that the team plays in golf order without thinking. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0164 After a shot is recorded, compute distance-to-pin for each team member's last unfinalized shot
  • ○ AC-0165 Auto-select the player with greatest distance
  • ○ AC-0166 Manual override available
  • ○ AC-0167 Players with sunk outcome on current hole excluded
  • ○ AC-0168 Works with team_size 2-5
US-0043 Planned High As a player, I want a hole summary after all teammates hole out, so that I can see who scored what and our team total. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0169 Per-player gross score listed with par-relative annotation (e.g., "bogey", "+2")
  • ○ AC-0170 "BEST" badge on the contributing player whose score won the hole
  • ○ AC-0171 Team standing pre-loaded (current position out of N)
  • ○ AC-0172 "Next: Hole X" CTA where X is the next physical hole (handles shotgun start wrap)
US-0044 Planned High As a player, I want to move to the next hole, so that play continues smoothly. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0173 Next advances to next physical hole accounting for 18-hole wrap from shotgun start
  • ○ AC-0174 New hole map renders; shot stream resets
US-0045 Planned Medium As a player, I want a "Hole X of 18" pill, so that I can see tournament progress regardless of which physical hole I'm on. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0175 Pill shows holes completed by team (1-18) plus current hole
US-0046 Planned Medium As a player, I want my round automatically marked complete when all 18 holes are scored, so that I'm not stuck in an "active" state. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0176 When all 18 hole_scores are final, rounds.status set to completed and completed_at set
  • ○ AC-0177 Player is shown a "Round complete" screen with final score
US-0047 Planned Medium As a player, I want manual coordinate entry if GPS permission is denied, so that I can still record shots. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0178 If geolocation permission denied, show explanation and "Tap the map" instructions
  • ○ AC-0179 Click on the map sets the shot's origin coordinates manually
US-0048 Planned Low As a player, I want distances shown as approximate, so that I'm not misled by GPS accuracy limits. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0180 Display format "~245 yds to pin" with the approx prefix
  • ○ AC-0181 GPS accuracy (in metres) stored on the shot record (optional column)
▼ EPIC-0006 Planned Scoring Engine Medium 1.1 MVP $3,200 projected
US-0049 Planned High As a developer, I want a PostgreSQL function calc_best_ball_for_hole, so that team scoring is computed server-side consistently. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0182 Function signature: calc_best_ball_for_hole(p_team_id uuid, p_hole_number int) returns (best_score int, contributing_player_id uuid, status hole_score_status)
  • ○ AC-0183 Returns min gross_score across team members for the hole
  • ○ AC-0184 Status is final only when all team_size members have final hole_score for this hole
  • ○ AC-0185 SQL tests verify with 2-, 3-, 4-, 5-player teams
US-0050 Planned High As a developer, I want a DB trigger on hole_scores that upserts team_hole_scores, so that team totals stay in sync without app-side bookkeeping. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0186 AFTER INSERT/UPDATE on hole_scores calls calc_best_ball_for_hole
  • ○ AC-0187 team_hole_scores row created or updated with returned values
  • ○ AC-0188 status (provisional/final) flows from the function result
US-0051 Planned Medium As a developer, I want score-vs-par helpers, so that the leaderboard can show "-2 to par" without app-side math. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0189 SQL view returns per-hole and cumulative score-vs-par
  • ○ AC-0190 Handles missing holes (returns null cumulative until first hole completes)
US-0052 Planned High As a developer, I want a team_standings SQL view, so that the leaderboard query is a single fetch. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0191 View aggregates team_hole_scores into total score, thru count, score-vs-par
  • ○ AC-0192 Sorted by score ascending, then thru descending
  • ○ AC-0193 Includes rank column with proper tied handling
US-0053 Planned High As a developer, I want provisional vs final status to be deterministic, so that the leaderboard never disagrees with the round. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0194 hole_scores.status=final when player has outcome=sunk OR shot count on hole > 8 (auto-finalize blowout)
  • ○ AC-0195 team_hole_scores.status=final only when all team_size members have final hole_score for the hole
US-0054 Planned High As a developer, I want test coverage of Best Ball edge cases, so that scoring bugs don't blow up the tournament. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0196 Tests cover variable team_size (2, 3, 4, 5)
  • ○ AC-0197 Mulligan shots (stroke_count=0) do not inflate scores
  • ○ AC-0198 OOB penalty stroke is correctly included in gross_score
  • ○ AC-0199 Withdrawn players excluded from team Best Ball calc
US-0055 Planned Medium As a player, I want provisional team scores shown distinctly on the leaderboard, so that I know which holes aren't fully scored yet. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0200 team_hole_scores.status returned in leaderboard payload
  • ○ AC-0201 Client renders italic grey for provisional, solid for final
▼ EPIC-0007 Planned Leaderboard Medium 1.1 MVP $3,600 projected
US-0056 Planned High As a spectator, I want a public leaderboard URL at /t/{slug}/leaderboard, so that I can follow the tournament without logging in. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0202 SSR; renders fast first-paint
  • ○ AC-0203 Tournament header: name, venue, date, sponsor logos
  • ○ AC-0204 No auth required
  • ○ AC-0205 Basic Open Graph meta tags (og:title, og:description)
  • ○ AC-0206 Privacy guard: only name + company shown for players
US-0057 Planned High As a player, I want my team's position prominent on the post-login leaderboard, so that I can see how we're doing at a glance. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0207 Hero card with green gradient pinned above the top-20 list
  • ○ AC-0208 Shows team #, members, current rank, score, thru count
  • ○ AC-0209 Shown regardless of where my team ranks
US-0058 Planned Medium As a player, I want a LIVE indicator on the leaderboard, so that I trust the data is fresh. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0210 Red blinking pill when websocket connected
  • ○ AC-0211 "AUTO 30s" pill when polling-only
US-0059 Planned High As a player, I want the leaderboard to update in real time, so that I see new scores as they come in. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0212 Client subscribes to Supabase Realtime channel tournament:{slug}
  • ○ AC-0213 Broadcasts on team_hole_scores changes only
  • ○ AC-0214 Reconnects on disconnect
US-0060 Planned Medium As a player, I want leaderboard updates coalesced, so that the UI doesn't thrash during heavy scoring activity. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0215 Multiple incoming events within 5s coalesce into one render
  • ○ AC-0216 Uses requestAnimationFrame for batching
US-0061 Planned Medium As a player, I want polling fallback when websocket fails, so that I'm not stuck with stale data. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0217 If websocket fails or stays disconnected >10s, switch to 30s polling
  • ○ AC-0218 Resume websocket when it comes back available
US-0062 Planned Medium As a player, I want to drill into a team to see their hole-by-hole scores, so that I can see how they're playing. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0219 Tap team row opens detail view
  • ○ AC-0220 9-hole strip x 2 (front and back nine)
  • ○ AC-0221 Rows: par, best score per hole
  • ○ AC-0222 Birdies+ highlighted gold
  • ○ AC-0223 Provisional scores italic grey
US-0063 Planned High As a player, I want personal data hidden on the public view, so that my privacy is respected. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0224 Public leaderboard payload omits email, phone, year_of_birth, gender
  • ○ AC-0225 Server-side filter enforced (not client-side)
US-0064 Planned Low As a spectator, I want a clear indication when the tournament is paused, so that I understand the standings might not be live. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0226 When tournaments.status=paused, banner shows "Tournament paused"
  • ○ AC-0227 LIVE pill disabled; data still visible
▼ EPIC-0008 Planned Admin Operations Medium 1.1 MVP $5,600 projected
US-0065 Planned Medium As an admin, I want a persistent left sidebar layout, so that I can navigate quickly between sections. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0228 Sidebar with 8 items: Dashboard, Tournaments, Players, Teams, Scores, Courses, Clubs, Stats
  • ○ AC-0229 Items grouped (operational vs setup)
  • ○ AC-0230 Current section highlighted
  • ○ AC-0231 Route-protected to admin role
US-0066 Planned High As an admin, I want 4 KPI stat cards on the dashboard, so that I can monitor tournament health at a glance. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0232 Players card shows registered count and recent delta
  • ○ AC-0233 Teams playing card shows in_progress rounds count
  • ○ AC-0234 Avg pace card shows computed minutes-per-hole vs target
  • ○ AC-0235 Sync issues card shows count and team numbers
  • ○ AC-0236 Auto-refresh every 30s
US-0067 Planned High As an admin, I want a live rounds table with pace warnings, so that I can chase slow groups before they back up the course. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0237 Table shows all in_progress rounds with team, players, thru, score, pace
  • ○ AC-0238 Rows where pace exceeds target by more than 2 min/hole highlighted amber
  • ○ AC-0239 Pace target configurable per tournament (default 12 min/hole)
  • ○ AC-0240 Click row to view the team's round
US-0068 Planned High As an admin, I want to search and filter players, so that I can find specific people fast. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0241 Server-side search by name, email, or company
  • ○ AC-0242 Chip filters: Unassigned, No 2FA, by company
  • ○ AC-0243 Pagination at 50 per page
  • ○ AC-0244 Row actions: Edit, Reset PW, Delete
US-0069 Planned High As an admin, I want to edit player profiles, so that I can fix mistakes and reset passwords. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0245 Edit modal with all profile fields
  • ○ AC-0246 Reset PW sends Supabase Auth recovery email
  • ○ AC-0247 Force-2FA toggle (Phase 2 enforcement)
US-0070 Planned Low As an admin, I want to delete a player with confirmation, so that I can clean up test accounts. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0248 Soft delete; preserves shot history for audit
  • ○ AC-0249 Player marked withdrawn in registration
  • ○ AC-0250 Confirmation dialog required
US-0071 Planned High As an admin, I want to drill into a round and edit any shot, so that I can resolve disputes. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0251 Round detail page shows holes 1-18 with shot lists
  • ○ AC-0252 Each shot row is editable: club, outcome, GPS, distance
  • ○ AC-0253 Save persists shot_edits audit row with admin actor
  • ○ AC-0254 Hole scores and team_hole_scores recompute via trigger
US-0072 Planned High As an admin, I want the audit trail visible per shot, so that I can defend score changes. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0255 Shot edit panel shows all changes with timestamp and author
  • ○ AC-0256 Admin edits shown amber for visual distinction
US-0073 Planned Medium As an admin, I want to assign and reassign players to teams, so that late changes can be made. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0257 Player row has team selector (dropdown or drag-drop)
  • ○ AC-0258 team_size respected on assignment
  • ○ AC-0259 Unassigned pool shown separately
US-0074 Planned Medium As an admin, I want to manage the master club list with drag-to-reorder, so that I can keep it tidy. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0260 Drag handles on each row
  • ○ AC-0261 Toggle active per club
  • ○ AC-0262 Edit display name, loft
  • ○ AC-0263 Soft delete on remove
US-0075 Planned Medium As an admin, I want sync issues flagged automatically, so that I can intervene without spotting them manually. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0264 Round flagged sync_issue when no shot insert AND no GPS heartbeat for >10 min during active round AND current hole not marked complete
  • ○ AC-0265 Background job (or cron RPC) updates a sync_issue field on rounds
  • ○ AC-0266 Dashboard KPI card shows count; click to drill in
US-0076 Planned Medium As an admin, I want a list of all tournaments, so that I can switch context between events. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0267 List shows all tournaments with name, date, status pill
  • ○ AC-0268 Filter by status
  • ○ AC-0269 Click enters tournament context (sets active tournament in admin session)
▼ EPIC-0009 Planned Offline & Sync Medium 1.1 MVP $3,200 projected
US-0077 Planned High As a developer, I want IndexedDB set up via idb library, so that the shot queue has a reliable client storage layer. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0270 idb library installed
  • ○ AC-0271 Versioned schema with shots store (key=tempId)
  • ○ AC-0272 Database opens on app boot
US-0078 Planned High As a player, I want shots written to IndexedDB first, so that no data is lost when the network drops. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0273 Every shot insert writes IndexedDB first with status=pending
  • ○ AC-0274 Background process drains pending shots to Supabase
  • ○ AC-0275 On Supabase success, IndexedDB row status=synced
US-0079 Planned Medium As a player, I want a visible offline indicator with queue depth, so that I know when sync is pending. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0276 Banner appears when navigator.onLine=false
  • ○ AC-0277 Banner shows queue depth (e.g., "3 shots queued")
  • ○ AC-0278 Auto-dismisses when online and queue is empty
US-0080 Planned High As a player, I want my queue to drain on reconnect with newer-wins resolution, so that my latest edits stick. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0279 Online event triggers queue drain
  • ○ AC-0280 Upsert by id; server compares updated_at and rejects older
  • ○ AC-0281 Rejected upserts logged to dev console for debugging
US-0081 Planned High As an admin, I want my edits to always win over client edits, so that disputes don't get overwritten by stale offline queues. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0282 Admin edit sets updated_by=admin_id and updated_at=now()
  • ○ AC-0283 Server-side trigger rejects any subsequent client upsert with older updated_at
US-0082 Planned High As a tester, I want an offline manual test pass, so that I'm confident the queue actually works on iOS Safari and Android Chrome. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0284 Test matrix documented: iOS 16/17/18 x Safari/Chrome x foreground/background mid-shot x airplane-mode toggle
  • ○ AC-0285 Each cell run manually with pass/fail captured
  • ○ AC-0286 Failures opened as BUGs in BUGS.md
▼ EPIC-0010 Planned Security & 2FA Medium 1.1 v1.1 $3,600 projected
US-0083 Planned Medium As a player, I want to enroll in 2FA via SMS, so that my account is more secure. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0287 Profile page has "Enable 2FA" CTA
  • ○ AC-0288 SMS sent to registered phone with verification code
  • ○ AC-0289 Code verification enrolls the factor in Supabase Auth
US-0084 Planned Medium As a player, I want a 2FA challenge on login, so that password compromise alone isn't enough to access my account. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0290 When factor exists, login prompts for SMS code after password
  • ○ AC-0291 "Remember this device" option for 30 days
US-0085 Planned Low As an admin, I want to force 2FA per player, so that high-privilege accounts must enroll. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0292 Admin toggle on player edit screen
  • ○ AC-0293 Next login forces enrollment before accessing the app
US-0086 Planned Medium As an admin, I want a log of sensitive admin actions, so that I can audit changes after the fact. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0294 admin_audit_log table created
  • ○ AC-0295 Records every admin action with target, before/after, timestamp
  • ○ AC-0296 Admin can view audit log filtered by date or actor
US-0087 Planned Low As a player, I want to flag a hole score for dispute, so that I can request a review without admin help. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 M · $800.00
  • ○ AC-0297 Round summary has a "Dispute" button per hole
  • ○ AC-0298 Dispute creates a score_disputes row with reason text
  • ○ AC-0299 tournament_organizer sees disputes queue
  • ○ AC-0300 Resolve or dismiss closes the dispute with a note
US-0088 Planned Medium As a developer, I want stronger password rules, so that accounts are harder to compromise. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0301 Min 12 chars, mixed case, number, symbol
  • ○ AC-0302 Strength meter on password fields
  • ○ AC-0303 Server-side validation matches client rules
US-0089 Planned Medium As a player, I want real emails for invites and password reset, so that I can use the app outside dev mode. ⚠ At Risk Medium 1.1 S · $400.00
  • ○ AC-0304 SMTP integration (Resend or AWS SES) configured
  • ○ AC-0305 Branded HTML templates for invite, password reset, 2FA codes
  • ○ AC-0306 Email send logs captured for support
▶ EPIC-0001 Planned Foundation & Infrastructure Medium 1.1 MVP $4,000 projected
Planned High US-0001

As a developer, I want a Next.js 14 App Router project scaffolded with TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Supabase client, so that all subsequent epics can build on a consistent foundation.

S $400.00 0/6 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0001 Next.js 14 App Router project boots locally with `npm run dev` and renders a placeholder page
  • ○ AC-0002 TypeScript strict mode enabled; `tsconfig.json` extends Next.js defaults
  • ○ AC-0003 Tailwind CSS configured with PostCSS pipeline; sample utility class renders
  • ○ AC-0004 shadcn/ui CLI initialized; `components/ui` directory exists with at least Button installed
  • ○ AC-0005 `@supabase/ssr` and `@supabase/supabase-js` installed; browser + server client factories in `lib/supabase/`
  • ○ AC-0006 `.env.local.example` documents `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`, `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN`
Planned High US-0002

As a developer, I want a Supabase project provisioned with PostgreSQL and email auth enabled, so that we have a backend ready for schema migrations and authentication.

S $400.00 0/4 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0007 Supabase project created (cloud or local via `supabase start`)
  • ○ AC-0008 Email + password auth provider enabled in Supabase Auth settings
  • ○ AC-0009 Project URL and anon key documented in `.env.local`
  • ○ AC-0010 `supabase/config.toml` checked into repo for reproducible local dev
Planned High US-0003

As a player, I want the FDgolf — built with AI/RUN app chrome on every authenticated page, so that the brand identity is consistent across the entire app.

S $400.00 0/5 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0011 `AppChrome` component renders dark forest-green (#0e2818) header bar
  • ○ AC-0012 Header displays "FDgolf" with green "FD" mark (#6ee7a0) and white "golf"
  • ○ AC-0013 Header displays "built with AI/RUN" tagline with AI/RUN logo on the right
  • ○ AC-0014 AppChrome is responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
  • ○ AC-0015 Used in the root `app/layout.tsx` so all routes inherit it
Planned High US-0004

As a player, I want to log in with email and password and stay logged in across page navigation, so that I don't have to re-authenticate constantly during my round.

S $400.00 0/6 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0016 `/login` page renders email + password form with FDgolf branding
  • ○ AC-0017 Successful login redirects to intended route (default `/`)
  • ○ AC-0018 Failed login displays an error message without exposing whether the email exists
  • ○ AC-0019 Session persists via cookies set by Supabase SSR client
  • ○ AC-0020 `/logout` route clears the session and redirects to `/login`
  • ○ AC-0021 Next.js middleware refreshes the session on every request
Planned High US-0005

As a developer, I want the complete DB schema migrated, so that all subsequent feature work has the tables it needs.

M $800.00 0/6 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0022 Migration creates tables: tournaments, courses, holes, players, user_roles, tournament_registrations, teams, rounds, shots, shot_edits, shot_attestations, hole_scores, team_hole_scores, clubs, tournament_clubs, score_disputes
  • ○ AC-0023 All enums defined: tournament_format, tournament_start_style, tournament_status, role_type, registration_status, round_status, shot_outcome, rehit_origin_type, hole_score_status, club_type, dispute_status
  • ○ AC-0024 Foreign keys and unique constraints match the data model in design spec section 4
  • ○ AC-0025 `teams.team_size` int column with check constraint (2 <= team_size <= 5)
  • ○ AC-0026 `shots.updated_at` defaults to now() and triggers update on row change
  • ○ AC-0027 Migration runs cleanly on a fresh database via `supabase db reset`
Planned High US-0006

As a developer, I want Row Level Security policies enforced on every table, so that tournament data is isolated and roles are respected.

M $800.00 0/7 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0028 RLS enabled on every table created in US-0005
  • ○ AC-0029 Public read on tournaments, team_hole_scores, clubs (drives the public leaderboard and registration landing)
  • ○ AC-0030 Players can read self + own team members; admin bypass exists
  • ○ AC-0031 Players can write shots only during own round
  • ○ AC-0032 tournament_organizer scoped to their tournament_id
  • ○ AC-0033 Public payload on team_hole_scores includes player name + company only (no email, phone, year_of_birth, gender)
  • ○ AC-0034 SQL tests verify each policy with a non-privileged JWT
Planned High US-0007

As a player, I want a Mapbox map ready to render in the app, so that round tracking can show me my position and the hole pin.

S $400.00 0/5 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0035 `mapbox-gl` and `react-map-gl` installed
  • ○ AC-0036 `MapView` component renders a Mapbox map centred on a passed-in lat/lng
  • ○ AC-0037 Custom golf-course-style URL configurable via env var with sensible default
  • ○ AC-0038 Component renders without errors when used in a Client Component
  • ○ AC-0039 Mapbox token loaded from `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN` env var; missing token shows a friendly fallback message instead of crashing
Planned Medium US-0008

As an admin, I want the master club list seeded with a standard golf bag, so that tournaments can use it out of the box.

S $400.00 0/4 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0040 Seed migration inserts 15 standard clubs: Driver, 3-wood, 5-wood, 3-hybrid, 4–9 iron, PW, GW, SW, LW, Putter
  • ○ AC-0041 Each club has `club_type`, `default_loft_degrees` (except Putter), `display_order`, `is_active=true`
  • ○ AC-0042 Display order matches a real golfer's bag traversal (Driver → wedges → Putter)
  • ○ AC-0043 Seed is idempotent (re-running does not create duplicates)
▶ EPIC-0002 Planned Tournament Setup (Admin) Medium 1.1 MVP $5,200 projected
Planned High US-0009

As an admin, I want to create a tournament with basic info, so that registration and play can be configured around it.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0044 Form fields: name (req), starts_at date+time (req), venue (req), format (req, defaults Best Ball), start_style (req, defaults shotgun), holes_count (req, defaults 18)
  • ○ AC-0045 On submit, tournament is created with status=draft
  • ○ AC-0046 Slug auto-generated from name (lowercase, hyphens, ascii-only)
Planned Medium US-0010

As an admin, I want to override the auto-generated slug, so that the public URL matches the printed invitations.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0047 Slug field is editable on the basics step of the wizard
  • ○ AC-0048 Uniqueness check runs on blur; conflict shows inline error
  • ○ AC-0049 Only lowercase letters, digits, hyphens accepted
Planned High US-0011

As an admin, I want to enter par, yardage, and stroke index for each hole, so that the scoring engine and round map have the data they need.

S $400.00 0/5 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0050 Course holes table renders one editable row per hole (1 to holes_count)
  • ○ AC-0051 Par values constrained to 3, 4, 5
  • ○ AC-0052 Stroke indices constrained to 1–18, unique within the course
  • ○ AC-0053 Total par computed and displayed at the bottom
  • ○ AC-0054 Save persists rows to the `holes` table linked to the tournament's course
Planned Medium US-0012

As an admin, I want a Granite Ridge GC preset to one-tap import, so that I don't hand-key 18 rows for the first tournament.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0055 "Import preset" button shows a list of available presets (at least Granite Ridge GC)
  • ○ AC-0056 Importing populates the 18-hole table with par, yardage, stroke index
  • ○ AC-0057 Admin can then edit any value before saving
Planned High US-0013

As an admin, I want to drop pin coordinates for each hole on a satellite map, so that the round tracking app can compute distance-to-pin.

M $800.00 0/6 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0058 Satellite map renders for each hole at a sensible default zoom around the course
  • ○ AC-0059 Click on the map drops a pin; coordinates saved to holes.pin_lat / pin_lng
  • ○ AC-0060 Tee coordinates can also be dropped (separate mode)
  • ○ AC-0061 Progress bar shows N of 18 holes with pins set
  • ○ AC-0062 "Save and continue to next hole" button auto-advances
  • ○ AC-0063 Holes table shows pin status (Set or Missing) per hole
Planned Medium US-0014

As a player, I want a Mapbox Static API PNG snapshot stored per hole, so that distance-to-pin works even if the Mapbox tile API is rate-limited mid-round.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0064 On pin save, a request is made to Mapbox Static API for the hole region
  • ○ AC-0065 PNG is uploaded to Supabase Storage in `course-maps/{courseId}/hole-{n}.png`
  • ○ AC-0066 `holes.static_map_url` populated with the public URL
Planned Medium US-0015

As an admin, I want to pick which clubs from the master list are available in this tournament, so that I can enforce sponsor-supplied bags or simplified club lists.

S $400.00 0/2 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0067 All master clubs listed with toggle controls; defaults to all-active
  • ○ AC-0068 Disabled clubs are excluded from the player's bag picker in pre-round setup
Planned High US-0016

As an admin, I want CIBC tournament sponsor logos (First Derivative, AI/Run) hardcoded for the first tournament, so that the public leaderboard ships on schedule.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0069 Logos shipped as static assets in `public/sponsors/`
  • ○ AC-0070 Tournament with slug `cibc-arc-2024` (or current first tournament's slug) shows both logos on public leaderboard
  • ○ AC-0071 Tournaments with other slugs show no sponsor logos until admin upload UI ships in Phase 2
Planned High US-0017

As an admin, I want a pre-flight checklist before activation, so that I don't open registration on a misconfigured tournament.

S $400.00 0/4 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0072 Checklist shows green checks for: basics complete, all holes configured (par 72 or expected), all 18 pin coordinates set, slug verified unique
  • ○ AC-0073 Checklist shows amber reminders for: clubs configured, teams unassigned
  • ○ AC-0074 Activate button disabled until all green checks pass
  • ○ AC-0075 Live preview card shows what the public leaderboard banner will look like
Planned High US-0018

As an admin, I want buttons to move the tournament between statuses, so that I can open registration, start play, and close the tournament cleanly.

S $400.00 0/5 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0076 From draft, "Open registration" moves status to registration_open
  • ○ AC-0077 From registration_open, "Start tournament" moves status to active
  • ○ AC-0078 From active, "Complete tournament" moves status to completed
  • ○ AC-0079 Paused status reachable via DB direct update; no UI in Phase 1
  • ○ AC-0080 Transitions are logged with timestamp and admin actor
Planned Medium US-0019

As an admin, I want the public registration URL displayed after activation, so that I can copy-paste it into the invite emails.

S $400.00 0/2 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0081 Post-activation confirmation screen shows the URL `fdgolf.app/register/{slug}`
  • ○ AC-0082 Copy-to-clipboard button
Planned Medium US-0020

As an admin, I want to promote a player to tournament_organizer for a specific tournament, so that ops responsibility can be delegated without granting global admin.

  • ○ AC-0083 Admin can search any player and click "Make organizer" for a tournament

▶ EPIC-0006 Planned Scoring Engine Medium 1.1 MVP $3,200 projected
Planned High US-0049

As a developer, I want a PostgreSQL function calc_best_ball_for_hole, so that team scoring is computed server-side consistently.

M $800.00 0/4 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0182 Function signature: calc_best_ball_for_hole(p_team_id uuid, p_hole_number int) returns (best_score int, contributing_player_id uuid, status hole_score_status)
  • ○ AC-0183 Returns min gross_score across team members for the hole
  • ○ AC-0184 Status is final only when all team_size members have final hole_score for this hole
  • ○ AC-0185 SQL tests verify with 2-, 3-, 4-, 5-player teams
Planned High US-0050

  • ○ AC-0186 AFTER INSERT/UPDATE on hole_scores calls calc_best_ball_for_hole

▶ EPIC-0009 Planned Offline & Sync Medium 1.1 MVP $3,200 projected
Planned High US-0077

Planned High US-0078

As a player, I want shots written to IndexedDB first, so that no data is lost when the network drops.

M $800.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0273 Every shot insert writes IndexedDB first with status=pending
  • ○ AC-0274 Background process drains pending shots to Supabase
  • ○ AC-0275 On Supabase success, IndexedDB row status=synced
Planned Medium US-0079

As a player, I want a visible offline indicator with queue depth, so that I know when sync is pending.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0276 Banner appears when navigator.onLine=false
  • ○ AC-0277 Banner shows queue depth (e.g., "3 shots queued")
  • ○ AC-0278 Auto-dismisses when online and queue is empty
Planned High US-0080

As a player, I want my queue to drain on reconnect with newer-wins resolution, so that my latest edits stick.

M $800.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0279 Online event triggers queue drain
  • ○ AC-0280 Upsert by id; server compares updated_at and rejects older
  • ○ AC-0281 Rejected upserts logged to dev console for debugging
Planned High US-0081

As an admin, I want my edits to always win over client edits, so that disputes don't get overwritten by stale offline queues.

S $400.00 0/2 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0282 Admin edit sets updated_by=admin_id and updated_at=now()
  • ○ AC-0283 Server-side trigger rejects any subsequent client upsert with older updated_at
Planned High US-0082

As a tester, I want an offline manual test pass, so that I'm confident the queue actually works on iOS Safari and Android Chrome.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0284 Test matrix documented: iOS 16/17/18 x Safari/Chrome x foreground/background mid-shot x airplane-mode toggle
  • ○ AC-0285 Each cell run manually with pass/fail captured
  • ○ AC-0286 Failures opened as BUGs in BUGS.md
▶ EPIC-0010 Planned Security & 2FA Medium 1.1 v1.1 $3,600 projected
Planned Medium US-0083

As a player, I want to enroll in 2FA via SMS, so that my account is more secure.

M $800.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0287 Profile page has "Enable 2FA" CTA
  • ○ AC-0288 SMS sent to registered phone with verification code
  • ○ AC-0289 Code verification enrolls the factor in Supabase Auth
Planned Medium US-0084

As a player, I want a 2FA challenge on login, so that password compromise alone isn't enough to access my account.

S $400.00 0/2 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0290 When factor exists, login prompts for SMS code after password
  • ○ AC-0291 "Remember this device" option for 30 days
Planned Low US-0085

As an admin, I want to force 2FA per player, so that high-privilege accounts must enroll.

S $400.00 0/2 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0292 Admin toggle on player edit screen
  • ○ AC-0293 Next login forces enrollment before accessing the app
Planned Medium US-0086

As an admin, I want a log of sensitive admin actions, so that I can audit changes after the fact.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0294 admin_audit_log table created
  • ○ AC-0295 Records every admin action with target, before/after, timestamp
  • ○ AC-0296 Admin can view audit log filtered by date or actor
Planned Low US-0087

As a player, I want to flag a hole score for dispute, so that I can request a review without admin help.

M $800.00 0/4 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0297 Round summary has a "Dispute" button per hole
  • ○ AC-0298 Dispute creates a score_disputes row with reason text
  • ○ AC-0299 tournament_organizer sees disputes queue
  • ○ AC-0300 Resolve or dismiss closes the dispute with a note
Planned Medium US-0088

As a developer, I want stronger password rules, so that accounts are harder to compromise.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0301 Min 12 chars, mixed case, number, symbol
  • ○ AC-0302 Strength meter on password fields
  • ○ AC-0303 Server-side validation matches client rules
Planned Medium US-0089

As a player, I want real emails for invites and password reset, so that I can use the app outside dev mode.

S $400.00 0/3 ACs ▾ Medium 1.1 ⚠ At Risk
  • ○ AC-0304 SMTP integration (Resend or AWS SES) configured
  • ○ AC-0305 Branded HTML templates for invite, password reset, 2FA codes
  • ○ AC-0306 Email send logs captured for support

▶ EPIC-0001 Planned Foundation & Infrastructure 8
High US-0001

As a developer, I want a Next.js 14 App Router project scaffolded with TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Supabase client, so that all subsequent epics can build on a consistent foundation.

S 0/6 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0001 Next.js 14 App Router project boots locally with `npm run dev` and renders a placeholder page
  • ○ AC-0002 TypeScript strict mode enabled; `tsconfig.json` extends Next.js defaults
  • ○ AC-0003 Tailwind CSS configured with PostCSS pipeline; sample utility class renders
  • ○ AC-0004 shadcn/ui CLI initialized; `components/ui` directory exists with at least Button installed
  • ○ AC-0005 `@supabase/ssr` and `@supabase/supabase-js` installed; browser + server client factories in `lib/supabase/`
  • ○ AC-0006 `.env.local.example` documents `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`, `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN`
High US-0002

As a developer, I want a Supabase project provisioned with PostgreSQL and email auth enabled, so that we have a backend ready for schema migrations and authentication.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0007 Supabase project created (cloud or local via `supabase start`)
  • ○ AC-0008 Email + password auth provider enabled in Supabase Auth settings
  • ○ AC-0009 Project URL and anon key documented in `.env.local`
  • ○ AC-0010 `supabase/config.toml` checked into repo for reproducible local dev
High US-0003

As a player, I want the FDgolf — built with AI/RUN app chrome on every authenticated page, so that the brand identity is consistent across the entire app.

S 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0011 `AppChrome` component renders dark forest-green (#0e2818) header bar
  • ○ AC-0012 Header displays "FDgolf" with green "FD" mark (#6ee7a0) and white "golf"
  • ○ AC-0013 Header displays "built with AI/RUN" tagline with AI/RUN logo on the right
  • ○ AC-0014 AppChrome is responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
  • ○ AC-0015 Used in the root `app/layout.tsx` so all routes inherit it
High US-0004

As a player, I want to log in with email and password and stay logged in across page navigation, so that I don't have to re-authenticate constantly during my round.

S 0/6 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0016 `/login` page renders email + password form with FDgolf branding
  • ○ AC-0017 Successful login redirects to intended route (default `/`)
  • ○ AC-0018 Failed login displays an error message without exposing whether the email exists
  • ○ AC-0019 Session persists via cookies set by Supabase SSR client
  • ○ AC-0020 `/logout` route clears the session and redirects to `/login`
  • ○ AC-0021 Next.js middleware refreshes the session on every request
High US-0005

As a developer, I want the complete DB schema migrated, so that all subsequent feature work has the tables it needs.

M 0/6 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0022 Migration creates tables: tournaments, courses, holes, players, user_roles, tournament_registrations, teams, rounds, shots, shot_edits, shot_attestations, hole_scores, team_hole_scores, clubs, tournament_clubs, score_disputes
  • ○ AC-0023 All enums defined: tournament_format, tournament_start_style, tournament_status, role_type, registration_status, round_status, shot_outcome, rehit_origin_type, hole_score_status, club_type, dispute_status
  • ○ AC-0024 Foreign keys and unique constraints match the data model in design spec section 4
  • ○ AC-0025 `teams.team_size` int column with check constraint (2 <= team_size <= 5)
  • ○ AC-0026 `shots.updated_at` defaults to now() and triggers update on row change
  • ○ AC-0027 Migration runs cleanly on a fresh database via `supabase db reset`
High US-0006

As a developer, I want Row Level Security policies enforced on every table, so that tournament data is isolated and roles are respected.

M 0/7 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0028 RLS enabled on every table created in US-0005
  • ○ AC-0029 Public read on tournaments, team_hole_scores, clubs (drives the public leaderboard and registration landing)
  • ○ AC-0030 Players can read self + own team members; admin bypass exists
  • ○ AC-0031 Players can write shots only during own round
  • ○ AC-0032 tournament_organizer scoped to their tournament_id
  • ○ AC-0033 Public payload on team_hole_scores includes player name + company only (no email, phone, year_of_birth, gender)
  • ○ AC-0034 SQL tests verify each policy with a non-privileged JWT
High US-0007

As a player, I want a Mapbox map ready to render in the app, so that round tracking can show me my position and the hole pin.

S 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0035 `mapbox-gl` and `react-map-gl` installed
  • ○ AC-0036 `MapView` component renders a Mapbox map centred on a passed-in lat/lng
  • ○ AC-0037 Custom golf-course-style URL configurable via env var with sensible default
  • ○ AC-0038 Component renders without errors when used in a Client Component
  • ○ AC-0039 Mapbox token loaded from `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN` env var; missing token shows a friendly fallback message instead of crashing
Medium US-0008

As an admin, I want the master club list seeded with a standard golf bag, so that tournaments can use it out of the box.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0040 Seed migration inserts 15 standard clubs: Driver, 3-wood, 5-wood, 3-hybrid, 4–9 iron, PW, GW, SW, LW, Putter
  • ○ AC-0041 Each club has `club_type`, `default_loft_degrees` (except Putter), `display_order`, `is_active=true`
  • ○ AC-0042 Display order matches a real golfer's bag traversal (Driver → wedges → Putter)
  • ○ AC-0043 Seed is idempotent (re-running does not create duplicates)
▶ EPIC-0002 Planned Tournament Setup (Admin) 12
High US-0009

As an admin, I want to create a tournament with basic info, so that registration and play can be configured around it.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0044 Form fields: name (req), starts_at date+time (req), venue (req), format (req, defaults Best Ball), start_style (req, defaults shotgun), holes_count (req, defaults 18)
  • ○ AC-0045 On submit, tournament is created with status=draft
  • ○ AC-0046 Slug auto-generated from name (lowercase, hyphens, ascii-only)
Medium US-0010

As an admin, I want to override the auto-generated slug, so that the public URL matches the printed invitations.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0047 Slug field is editable on the basics step of the wizard
  • ○ AC-0048 Uniqueness check runs on blur; conflict shows inline error
  • ○ AC-0049 Only lowercase letters, digits, hyphens accepted
High US-0011

As an admin, I want to enter par, yardage, and stroke index for each hole, so that the scoring engine and round map have the data they need.

S 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0050 Course holes table renders one editable row per hole (1 to holes_count)
  • ○ AC-0051 Par values constrained to 3, 4, 5
  • ○ AC-0052 Stroke indices constrained to 1–18, unique within the course
  • ○ AC-0053 Total par computed and displayed at the bottom
  • ○ AC-0054 Save persists rows to the `holes` table linked to the tournament's course
Medium US-0012

As an admin, I want a Granite Ridge GC preset to one-tap import, so that I don't hand-key 18 rows for the first tournament.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0055 "Import preset" button shows a list of available presets (at least Granite Ridge GC)
  • ○ AC-0056 Importing populates the 18-hole table with par, yardage, stroke index
  • ○ AC-0057 Admin can then edit any value before saving
High US-0013

As an admin, I want to drop pin coordinates for each hole on a satellite map, so that the round tracking app can compute distance-to-pin.

M 0/6 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0058 Satellite map renders for each hole at a sensible default zoom around the course
  • ○ AC-0059 Click on the map drops a pin; coordinates saved to holes.pin_lat / pin_lng
  • ○ AC-0060 Tee coordinates can also be dropped (separate mode)
  • ○ AC-0061 Progress bar shows N of 18 holes with pins set
  • ○ AC-0062 "Save and continue to next hole" button auto-advances
  • ○ AC-0063 Holes table shows pin status (Set or Missing) per hole
Medium US-0014

As a player, I want a Mapbox Static API PNG snapshot stored per hole, so that distance-to-pin works even if the Mapbox tile API is rate-limited mid-round.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0064 On pin save, a request is made to Mapbox Static API for the hole region
  • ○ AC-0065 PNG is uploaded to Supabase Storage in `course-maps/{courseId}/hole-{n}.png`
  • ○ AC-0066 `holes.static_map_url` populated with the public URL
Medium US-0015

As an admin, I want to pick which clubs from the master list are available in this tournament, so that I can enforce sponsor-supplied bags or simplified club lists.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0067 All master clubs listed with toggle controls; defaults to all-active
  • ○ AC-0068 Disabled clubs are excluded from the player's bag picker in pre-round setup
High US-0016

As an admin, I want CIBC tournament sponsor logos (First Derivative, AI/Run) hardcoded for the first tournament, so that the public leaderboard ships on schedule.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0069 Logos shipped as static assets in `public/sponsors/`
  • ○ AC-0070 Tournament with slug `cibc-arc-2024` (or current first tournament's slug) shows both logos on public leaderboard
  • ○ AC-0071 Tournaments with other slugs show no sponsor logos until admin upload UI ships in Phase 2
High US-0017

As an admin, I want a pre-flight checklist before activation, so that I don't open registration on a misconfigured tournament.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0072 Checklist shows green checks for: basics complete, all holes configured (par 72 or expected), all 18 pin coordinates set, slug verified unique
  • ○ AC-0073 Checklist shows amber reminders for: clubs configured, teams unassigned
  • ○ AC-0074 Activate button disabled until all green checks pass
  • ○ AC-0075 Live preview card shows what the public leaderboard banner will look like
High US-0018

As an admin, I want buttons to move the tournament between statuses, so that I can open registration, start play, and close the tournament cleanly.

S 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0076 From draft, "Open registration" moves status to registration_open
  • ○ AC-0077 From registration_open, "Start tournament" moves status to active
  • ○ AC-0078 From active, "Complete tournament" moves status to completed
  • ○ AC-0079 Paused status reachable via DB direct update; no UI in Phase 1
  • ○ AC-0080 Transitions are logged with timestamp and admin actor
Medium US-0019

As an admin, I want the public registration URL displayed after activation, so that I can copy-paste it into the invite emails.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0081 Post-activation confirmation screen shows the URL `fdgolf.app/register/{slug}`
  • ○ AC-0082 Copy-to-clipboard button
Medium US-0020

As an admin, I want to promote a player to tournament_organizer for a specific tournament, so that ops responsibility can be delegated without granting global admin.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0083 Admin can search any player and click "Make organizer" for a tournament
  • ○ AC-0084 user_roles row inserted with role=tournament_organizer and tournament_id=this_tournament
  • ○ AC-0085 Organizer can perform admin actions only on rows where tournament_id matches their role's tournament_id
▶ EPIC-0003 Planned Registration & Profile 9
High US-0021

As a player, I want a tournament-branded invite landing page, so that I know what I'm signing up for before I start the form.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0086 Route `/register/{slug}` resolves the tournament from the slug
  • ○ AC-0087 Tournament name, venue, date, format displayed
  • ○ AC-0088 Sponsor logos visible (if configured)
  • ○ AC-0089 "Register" CTA and "I have an account" link
High US-0022

As a player, I want to enter my personal info, so that the system knows who I am and how to contact me.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0090 Required fields: full name, title, company, email, mobile phone
  • ○ AC-0091 Optional fields explicitly labelled: year of birth (opt), gender (opt with prefer-not-to-say)
  • ○ AC-0092 Email format and phone format validated client-side and server-side
  • ○ AC-0093 Form values persist across step navigation
High US-0023

As a player, I want to set a password with confirmation, so that I can log in next time.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0094 Two password fields with match validation
  • ○ AC-0095 Minimum 8 characters required in Phase 1 (Phase 2 strengthens)
  • ○ AC-0096 On submit, account created via Supabase Auth and player row inserted
  • ○ AC-0097 Player is auto-logged-in after account creation
High US-0024

As a player, I want to choose my team and search for foursome members, so that I'm grouped with my colleagues for play.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0098 Team number selector lists 1 to tournament max teams
  • ○ AC-0099 Member search returns existing registered players by name or email
  • ○ AC-0100 "Add member" can add placeholder rows for non-registered players (email-only)
  • ○ AC-0101 tournament_registrations row created with team_id linked
High US-0025

As a team captain, I want to register and assign all my team members in one flow, so that non-tech executives don't have to use the app themselves.

M 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0102 During registration, player can check "I'm the team captain"
  • ○ AC-0103 Captain dashboard at /team/{teamId}/captain accessible post-login
  • ○ AC-0104 Captain can add new team members by name + email
  • ○ AC-0105 Each added member gets a signed invite link sent (stub email; logged to console in Phase 1)
  • ○ AC-0106 Invite link goes to a one-step "Set password" page with profile pre-filled by captain
Medium US-0026

As a developer, I want a signed invite link generator and verifier, so that captain-issued invites are tamper-proof.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0107 Generator produces a JWT signed with Supabase service role key containing player_id and team_id
  • ○ AC-0108 Verifier rejects expired (>14 days) and invalid signatures
  • ○ AC-0109 Email send is stubbed in Phase 1 (logged); real send wired in Phase 2
Medium US-0027

As a player, I want a profile page where I can view and edit my info, so that I can correct mistakes and see my tournament history.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0110 Route `/profile` shows current player's profile
  • ○ AC-0111 Editable: name, title, company, phone, year of birth, gender
  • ○ AC-0112 Read-only: email, handicap (Phase 2 edits handicap)
  • ○ AC-0113 Tournament history list (Phase 1 shows current tournament only)
Medium US-0028

As a player, I want to request a password reset link, so that I can recover my account if I forget my password.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0114 `/forgot-password` accepts email, calls Supabase Auth reset
  • ○ AC-0115 Confirmation shown ("Check your inbox") regardless of whether the email exists
  • ○ AC-0116 Reset link from email opens `/reset-password?token=...` page where new password can be set
High US-0029

As an admin, I want teams to support 2-, 3-, 4-, or 5-player sizes, so that drop-outs and oversized teams are handled cleanly.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0117 Team form has team_size selector 2-5 (default 4)
  • ○ AC-0118 Team detail UI says "Foursome" when team_size=4, "team of N" otherwise
  • ○ AC-0119 Best Ball calculation in EPIC-0006 uses actual team_size (not hardcoded 4)

High US-0030

As a player, I want a tournament home page after I log in, so that I know my tee time, my team, and where to start.

S 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0120 Countdown to starts_at displayed at top
  • ○ AC-0121 Team card with all members and their company

S 0/2 ACs ▾
