  • ○ AC-0130 "Change" button opens picker with team members
High US-0033

As a player, I want my round record created when I tap Start Round, so that subsequent shots have a parent.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0131 Inserts rounds row with status=in_progress, start_hole=tournament-assigned, started_at=now()
  • ○ AC-0132 Redirects to /round/{roundId} after creation
High US-0034

As a player, I want a Begin Hole X entry screen, so that I see the map, distance, and club picker before I take my first shot.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0133 Map view shows hole pin, my GPS location, tee marker
  • ○ AC-0134 Distance-to-pin displayed (approx prefix)
  • ○ AC-0135 Club picker shows tournament bag with smart default (Driver on tee, otherwise last-used)
  • ○ AC-0136 "Start shot — capture GPS" CTA
▶ EPIC-0005 Planned Round Tracking 14
High US-0035

As a player, I want the active hole map view to show my shot trail, so that I can see where I've been and where the pin is.

M 0/6 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0137 Map shows fairway base layer from cached Mapbox Static URL
  • ○ AC-0138 Hole pin marker rendered
  • ○ AC-0139 Tee marker rendered
  • ○ AC-0140 Prior shots rendered as dashed lines + numbered markers
  • ○ AC-0141 Current player position pulsed in red
  • ○ AC-0142 Distance-to-pin overlay top-left
High US-0036

As a player, I want to capture my GPS position when I take a shot, so that the system knows where I hit from.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0143 navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition called with high accuracy
  • ○ AC-0144 lat/lng captured to local state on Start Shot tap
  • ○ AC-0145 Selected club persisted with the shot draft
High US-0037

As a player, I want four outcome buttons after I hit a shot, so that I can record what happened.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0146 Four buttons: In Play (neutral green), Sunk (filled green), Mulligan (amber), OOB (red)
  • ○ AC-0147 In Play / Sunk / Mulligan tap inserts shots row with appropriate stroke_count (1 / 1 / 0)
  • ○ AC-0148 OOB tap triggers the OOB rehit prompt (US-0038)
High US-0038

As a player, I want to choose where my rehit comes from after OOB, so that the recorded GPS origin is accurate.

M 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0149 Prompt offers "Rehit from OOB location" or "Rehit from prior position"
  • ○ AC-0150 OOB shot inserted with stroke_count=2 (1 for shot + 1 penalty)
  • ○ AC-0151 Follow-up shot's origin_lat/lng set to chosen rehit position
  • ○ AC-0152 rehit_from_shot_id and rehit_origin set on the follow-up shot
Medium US-0039

As a player, I want Mulligan to not count as a stroke, so that I can reshoot without penalty.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0153 Mulligan outcome inserts shot with stroke_count=0
  • ○ AC-0154 Next shot's origin defaults to same location
High US-0040

As a player, I want Shot Sunk to close the hole for me, so that the hole score is recorded and the turn moves on.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0155 Sunk outcome inserts shot with stroke_count=1
  • ○ AC-0156 Computes gross_score as sum of stroke_count on this hole
  • ○ AC-0157 Inserts/updates hole_scores row with status=provisional or final
  • ○ AC-0158 Triggers team_hole_scores recalc via EPIC-0006
High US-0041

As a player, I want to edit any prior shot in this round, so that I can correct mistakes without admin help.

M 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0159 Tap a shot in the map or hole summary to open the edit panel
  • ○ AC-0160 Editable: club, outcome, GPS origin
  • ○ AC-0161 Before/after states recorded in shot_edits audit table
  • ○ AC-0162 shots.updated_at and updated_by set on save
  • ○ AC-0163 Hole scores recalculated if outcome or stroke_count changed
Medium US-0042

As a player, I want the foursome turn picker to auto-select the next player by farthest from pin, so that the team plays in golf order without thinking.

S 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0164 After a shot is recorded, compute distance-to-pin for each team member's last unfinalized shot
  • ○ AC-0165 Auto-select the player with greatest distance
  • ○ AC-0166 Manual override available
  • ○ AC-0167 Players with sunk outcome on current hole excluded
  • ○ AC-0168 Works with team_size 2-5
High US-0043

As a player, I want a hole summary after all teammates hole out, so that I can see who scored what and our team total.

M 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0169 Per-player gross score listed with par-relative annotation (e.g., "bogey", "+2")
  • ○ AC-0170 "BEST" badge on the contributing player whose score won the hole
  • ○ AC-0171 Team standing pre-loaded (current position out of N)
  • ○ AC-0172 "Next: Hole X" CTA where X is the next physical hole (handles shotgun start wrap)
High US-0044

As a player, I want to move to the next hole, so that play continues smoothly.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0173 Next advances to next physical hole accounting for 18-hole wrap from shotgun start
  • ○ AC-0174 New hole map renders; shot stream resets
Medium US-0045

As a player, I want a "Hole X of 18" pill, so that I can see tournament progress regardless of which physical hole I'm on.

S 0/1 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0175 Pill shows holes completed by team (1-18) plus current hole
Medium US-0046

As a player, I want my round automatically marked complete when all 18 holes are scored, so that I'm not stuck in an "active" state.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0176 When all 18 hole_scores are final, rounds.status set to completed and completed_at set
  • ○ AC-0177 Player is shown a "Round complete" screen with final score
Medium US-0047

As a player, I want manual coordinate entry if GPS permission is denied, so that I can still record shots.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0178 If geolocation permission denied, show explanation and "Tap the map" instructions
  • ○ AC-0179 Click on the map sets the shot's origin coordinates manually
Low US-0048

As a player, I want distances shown as approximate, so that I'm not misled by GPS accuracy limits.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0180 Display format "~245 yds to pin" with the approx prefix
  • ○ AC-0181 GPS accuracy (in metres) stored on the shot record (optional column)
▶ EPIC-0006 Planned Scoring Engine 7
High US-0049

As a developer, I want a PostgreSQL function calc_best_ball_for_hole, so that team scoring is computed server-side consistently.

M 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0182 Function signature: calc_best_ball_for_hole(p_team_id uuid, p_hole_number int) returns (best_score int, contributing_player_id uuid, status hole_score_status)
  • ○ AC-0183 Returns min gross_score across team members for the hole
  • ○ AC-0184 Status is final only when all team_size members have final hole_score for this hole
  • ○ AC-0185 SQL tests verify with 2-, 3-, 4-, 5-player teams
High US-0050

As a developer, I want a DB trigger on hole_scores that upserts team_hole_scores, so that team totals stay in sync without app-side bookkeeping.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0186 AFTER INSERT/UPDATE on hole_scores calls calc_best_ball_for_hole
  • ○ AC-0187 team_hole_scores row created or updated with returned values
  • ○ AC-0188 status (provisional/final) flows from the function result
Medium US-0051

As a developer, I want score-vs-par helpers, so that the leaderboard can show "-2 to par" without app-side math.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0189 SQL view returns per-hole and cumulative score-vs-par
  • ○ AC-0190 Handles missing holes (returns null cumulative until first hole completes)
High US-0052

As a developer, I want a team_standings SQL view, so that the leaderboard query is a single fetch.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0191 View aggregates team_hole_scores into total score, thru count, score-vs-par
  • ○ AC-0192 Sorted by score ascending, then thru descending
  • ○ AC-0193 Includes rank column with proper tied handling
High US-0053

As a developer, I want provisional vs final status to be deterministic, so that the leaderboard never disagrees with the round.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0194 hole_scores.status=final when player has outcome=sunk OR shot count on hole > 8 (auto-finalize blowout)
  • ○ AC-0195 team_hole_scores.status=final only when all team_size members have final hole_score for the hole
High US-0054

As a developer, I want test coverage of Best Ball edge cases, so that scoring bugs don't blow up the tournament.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0196 Tests cover variable team_size (2, 3, 4, 5)
  • ○ AC-0197 Mulligan shots (stroke_count=0) do not inflate scores
  • ○ AC-0198 OOB penalty stroke is correctly included in gross_score
  • ○ AC-0199 Withdrawn players excluded from team Best Ball calc
Medium US-0055

As a player, I want provisional team scores shown distinctly on the leaderboard, so that I know which holes aren't fully scored yet.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0200 team_hole_scores.status returned in leaderboard payload
  • ○ AC-0201 Client renders italic grey for provisional, solid for final
▶ EPIC-0007 Planned Leaderboard 9
High US-0056

As a spectator, I want a public leaderboard URL at /t/{slug}/leaderboard, so that I can follow the tournament without logging in.

S 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0202 SSR; renders fast first-paint
  • ○ AC-0203 Tournament header: name, venue, date, sponsor logos
  • ○ AC-0204 No auth required
  • ○ AC-0205 Basic Open Graph meta tags (og:title, og:description)
  • ○ AC-0206 Privacy guard: only name + company shown for players
High US-0057

As a player, I want my team's position prominent on the post-login leaderboard, so that I can see how we're doing at a glance.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0207 Hero card with green gradient pinned above the top-20 list
  • ○ AC-0208 Shows team #, members, current rank, score, thru count
  • ○ AC-0209 Shown regardless of where my team ranks
Medium US-0058

As a player, I want a LIVE indicator on the leaderboard, so that I trust the data is fresh.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0210 Red blinking pill when websocket connected
  • ○ AC-0211 "AUTO 30s" pill when polling-only
High US-0059

As a player, I want the leaderboard to update in real time, so that I see new scores as they come in.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0212 Client subscribes to Supabase Realtime channel tournament:{slug}
  • ○ AC-0213 Broadcasts on team_hole_scores changes only
  • ○ AC-0214 Reconnects on disconnect
Medium US-0060

As a player, I want leaderboard updates coalesced, so that the UI doesn't thrash during heavy scoring activity.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0215 Multiple incoming events within 5s coalesce into one render
  • ○ AC-0216 Uses requestAnimationFrame for batching
Medium US-0061

As a player, I want polling fallback when websocket fails, so that I'm not stuck with stale data.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0217 If websocket fails or stays disconnected >10s, switch to 30s polling
  • ○ AC-0218 Resume websocket when it comes back available
Medium US-0062

As a player, I want to drill into a team to see their hole-by-hole scores, so that I can see how they're playing.

S 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0219 Tap team row opens detail view
  • ○ AC-0220 9-hole strip x 2 (front and back nine)
  • ○ AC-0221 Rows: par, best score per hole
  • ○ AC-0222 Birdies+ highlighted gold
  • ○ AC-0223 Provisional scores italic grey
High US-0063

As a player, I want personal data hidden on the public view, so that my privacy is respected.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0224 Public leaderboard payload omits email, phone, year_of_birth, gender
  • ○ AC-0225 Server-side filter enforced (not client-side)
Low US-0064

As a spectator, I want a clear indication when the tournament is paused, so that I understand the standings might not be live.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0226 When tournaments.status=paused, banner shows "Tournament paused"
  • ○ AC-0227 LIVE pill disabled; data still visible
▶ EPIC-0008 Planned Admin Operations 12
Medium US-0065

As an admin, I want a persistent left sidebar layout, so that I can navigate quickly between sections.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0228 Sidebar with 8 items: Dashboard, Tournaments, Players, Teams, Scores, Courses, Clubs, Stats
  • ○ AC-0229 Items grouped (operational vs setup)
  • ○ AC-0230 Current section highlighted
  • ○ AC-0231 Route-protected to admin role
High US-0066

As an admin, I want 4 KPI stat cards on the dashboard, so that I can monitor tournament health at a glance.

S 0/5 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0232 Players card shows registered count and recent delta
  • ○ AC-0233 Teams playing card shows in_progress rounds count
  • ○ AC-0234 Avg pace card shows computed minutes-per-hole vs target
  • ○ AC-0235 Sync issues card shows count and team numbers
  • ○ AC-0236 Auto-refresh every 30s
High US-0067

As an admin, I want a live rounds table with pace warnings, so that I can chase slow groups before they back up the course.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0237 Table shows all in_progress rounds with team, players, thru, score, pace
  • ○ AC-0238 Rows where pace exceeds target by more than 2 min/hole highlighted amber
  • ○ AC-0239 Pace target configurable per tournament (default 12 min/hole)
  • ○ AC-0240 Click row to view the team's round
High US-0068

As an admin, I want to search and filter players, so that I can find specific people fast.

M 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0241 Server-side search by name, email, or company
  • ○ AC-0242 Chip filters: Unassigned, No 2FA, by company
  • ○ AC-0243 Pagination at 50 per page
  • ○ AC-0244 Row actions: Edit, Reset PW, Delete
High US-0069

As an admin, I want to edit player profiles, so that I can fix mistakes and reset passwords.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0245 Edit modal with all profile fields
  • ○ AC-0246 Reset PW sends Supabase Auth recovery email
  • ○ AC-0247 Force-2FA toggle (Phase 2 enforcement)
Low US-0070

As an admin, I want to delete a player with confirmation, so that I can clean up test accounts.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0248 Soft delete; preserves shot history for audit
  • ○ AC-0249 Player marked withdrawn in registration
  • ○ AC-0250 Confirmation dialog required
High US-0071

As an admin, I want to drill into a round and edit any shot, so that I can resolve disputes.

M 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0251 Round detail page shows holes 1-18 with shot lists
  • ○ AC-0252 Each shot row is editable: club, outcome, GPS, distance
  • ○ AC-0253 Save persists shot_edits audit row with admin actor
  • ○ AC-0254 Hole scores and team_hole_scores recompute via trigger
High US-0072

As an admin, I want the audit trail visible per shot, so that I can defend score changes.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0255 Shot edit panel shows all changes with timestamp and author
  • ○ AC-0256 Admin edits shown amber for visual distinction
Medium US-0073

As an admin, I want to assign and reassign players to teams, so that late changes can be made.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0257 Player row has team selector (dropdown or drag-drop)
  • ○ AC-0258 team_size respected on assignment
  • ○ AC-0259 Unassigned pool shown separately
Medium US-0074

As an admin, I want to manage the master club list with drag-to-reorder, so that I can keep it tidy.

S 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0260 Drag handles on each row
  • ○ AC-0261 Toggle active per club
  • ○ AC-0262 Edit display name, loft
  • ○ AC-0263 Soft delete on remove
Medium US-0075

As an admin, I want sync issues flagged automatically, so that I can intervene without spotting them manually.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0264 Round flagged sync_issue when no shot insert AND no GPS heartbeat for >10 min during active round AND current hole not marked complete
  • ○ AC-0265 Background job (or cron RPC) updates a sync_issue field on rounds
  • ○ AC-0266 Dashboard KPI card shows count; click to drill in
Medium US-0076

As an admin, I want a list of all tournaments, so that I can switch context between events.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0267 List shows all tournaments with name, date, status pill
  • ○ AC-0268 Filter by status
  • ○ AC-0269 Click enters tournament context (sets active tournament in admin session)
▶ EPIC-0009 Planned Offline & Sync 6
High US-0077

As a developer, I want IndexedDB set up via idb library, so that the shot queue has a reliable client storage layer.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0270 idb library installed
  • ○ AC-0271 Versioned schema with shots store (key=tempId)
  • ○ AC-0272 Database opens on app boot
High US-0078

As a player, I want shots written to IndexedDB first, so that no data is lost when the network drops.

M 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0273 Every shot insert writes IndexedDB first with status=pending
  • ○ AC-0274 Background process drains pending shots to Supabase
  • ○ AC-0275 On Supabase success, IndexedDB row status=synced
Medium US-0079

As a player, I want a visible offline indicator with queue depth, so that I know when sync is pending.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0276 Banner appears when navigator.onLine=false
  • ○ AC-0277 Banner shows queue depth (e.g., "3 shots queued")
  • ○ AC-0278 Auto-dismisses when online and queue is empty
High US-0080

As a player, I want my queue to drain on reconnect with newer-wins resolution, so that my latest edits stick.

M 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0279 Online event triggers queue drain
  • ○ AC-0280 Upsert by id; server compares updated_at and rejects older
  • ○ AC-0281 Rejected upserts logged to dev console for debugging
High US-0081

As an admin, I want my edits to always win over client edits, so that disputes don't get overwritten by stale offline queues.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0282 Admin edit sets updated_by=admin_id and updated_at=now()
  • ○ AC-0283 Server-side trigger rejects any subsequent client upsert with older updated_at
High US-0082

As a tester, I want an offline manual test pass, so that I'm confident the queue actually works on iOS Safari and Android Chrome.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0284 Test matrix documented: iOS 16/17/18 x Safari/Chrome x foreground/background mid-shot x airplane-mode toggle
  • ○ AC-0285 Each cell run manually with pass/fail captured
  • ○ AC-0286 Failures opened as BUGs in BUGS.md
▶ EPIC-0010 Planned Security & 2FA 7
Medium US-0083

As a player, I want to enroll in 2FA via SMS, so that my account is more secure.

M 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0287 Profile page has "Enable 2FA" CTA
  • ○ AC-0288 SMS sent to registered phone with verification code
  • ○ AC-0289 Code verification enrolls the factor in Supabase Auth
Medium US-0084

As a player, I want a 2FA challenge on login, so that password compromise alone isn't enough to access my account.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0290 When factor exists, login prompts for SMS code after password
  • ○ AC-0291 "Remember this device" option for 30 days
Low US-0085

As an admin, I want to force 2FA per player, so that high-privilege accounts must enroll.

S 0/2 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0292 Admin toggle on player edit screen
  • ○ AC-0293 Next login forces enrollment before accessing the app
Medium US-0086

As an admin, I want a log of sensitive admin actions, so that I can audit changes after the fact.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0294 admin_audit_log table created
  • ○ AC-0295 Records every admin action with target, before/after, timestamp
  • ○ AC-0296 Admin can view audit log filtered by date or actor
Low US-0087

As a player, I want to flag a hole score for dispute, so that I can request a review without admin help.

M 0/4 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0297 Round summary has a "Dispute" button per hole
  • ○ AC-0298 Dispute creates a score_disputes row with reason text
  • ○ AC-0299 tournament_organizer sees disputes queue
  • ○ AC-0300 Resolve or dismiss closes the dispute with a note
Medium US-0088

As a developer, I want stronger password rules, so that accounts are harder to compromise.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0301 Min 12 chars, mixed case, number, symbol
  • ○ AC-0302 Strength meter on password fields
  • ○ AC-0303 Server-side validation matches client rules
Medium US-0089

As a player, I want real emails for invites and password reset, so that I can use the app outside dev mode.

S 0/3 ACs ▾
  • ○ AC-0304 SMTP integration (Resend or AWS SES) configured
  • ○ AC-0305 Branded HTML templates for invite, password reset, 2FA codes
  • ○ AC-0306 Email send logs captured for support

▶ EPIC-0001 Foundation & Infrastructure Planned 8 stories · click to expand $4,000 $1.68 0 / 0
US-0001 As a developer, I want a Next.js 14 App Router project scaffolded with TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Supabase client, so that all subsequent epics can build on a consistent foundation. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0002 As a developer, I want a Supabase project provisioned with PostgreSQL and email auth enabled, so that we have a backend ready for schema migrations and authentication. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0003 As a player, I want the FDgolf — built with AI/RUN app chrome on every authenticated page, so that the brand identity is consistent across the entire app. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0004 As a player, I want to log in with email and password and stay logged in across page navigation, so that I don't have to re-authenticate constantly during my round. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0005 As a developer, I want the complete DB schema migrated, so that all subsequent feature work has the tables it needs. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0006 As a developer, I want Row Level Security policies enforced on every table, so that tournament data is isolated and roles are respected. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0007 As a player, I want a Mapbox map ready to render in the app, so that round tracking can show me my position and the hole pin. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0008 As an admin, I want the master club list seeded with a standard golf bag, so that tournaments can use it out of the box. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
▶ EPIC-0002 Tournament Setup (Admin) Planned 12 stories · click to expand $5,200 $2.52 0 / 0
US-0009 As an admin, I want to create a tournament with basic info, so that registration and play can be configured around it. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0010 As an admin, I want to override the auto-generated slug, so that the public URL matches the printed invitations. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0011 As an admin, I want to enter par, yardage, and stroke index for each hole, so that the scoring engine and round map have the data they need. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0012 As an admin, I want a Granite Ridge GC preset to one-tap import, so that I don't hand-key 18 rows for the first tournament. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0013 As an admin, I want to drop pin coordinates for each hole on a satellite map, so that the round tracking app can compute distance-to-pin. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0014 As a player, I want a Mapbox Static API PNG snapshot stored per hole, so that distance-to-pin works even if the Mapbox tile API is rate-limited mid-round. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0015 As an admin, I want to pick which clubs from the master list are available in this tournament, so that I can enforce sponsor-supplied bags or simplified club lists. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0016 As an admin, I want CIBC tournament sponsor logos (First Derivative, AI/Run) hardcoded for the first tournament, so that the public leaderboard ships on schedule. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0017 As an admin, I want a pre-flight checklist before activation, so that I don't open registration on a misconfigured tournament. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0018 As an admin, I want buttons to move the tournament between statuses, so that I can open registration, start play, and close the tournament cleanly. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0019 As an admin, I want the public registration URL displayed after activation, so that I can copy-paste it into the invite emails. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0020 As an admin, I want to promote a player to tournament_organizer for a specific tournament, so that ops responsibility can be delegated without granting global admin. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
▶ EPIC-0003 Registration & Profile Planned 9 stories · click to expand $4,000 $1.89 0 / 0
US-0021 As a player, I want a tournament-branded invite landing page, so that I know what I'm signing up for before I start the form. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0022 As a player, I want to enter my personal info, so that the system knows who I am and how to contact me. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0023 As a player, I want to set a password with confirmation, so that I can log in next time. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0024 As a player, I want to choose my team and search for foursome members, so that I'm grouped with my colleagues for play. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0025 As a team captain, I want to register and assign all my team members in one flow, so that non-tech executives don't have to use the app themselves. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0026 As a developer, I want a signed invite link generator and verifier, so that captain-issued invites are tamper-proof. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0027 As a player, I want a profile page where I can view and edit my info, so that I can correct mistakes and see my tournament history. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0028 As a player, I want to request a password reset link, so that I can recover my account if I forget my password. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0029 As an admin, I want teams to support 2-, 3-, 4-, or 5-player sizes, so that drop-outs and oversized teams are handled cleanly. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
▶ EPIC-0004 Pre-Round Setup Planned 5 stories · click to expand $2,000 $1.05 0 / 0
US-0030 As a player, I want a tournament home page after I log in, so that I know my tee time, my team, and where to start. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0031 As a player, I want to confirm or remove clubs from my bag before I start, so that the picker shows only clubs I actually have. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0032 As a player, I want to confirm who goes first, so that the team starts in the right order. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0033 As a player, I want my round record created when I tap Start Round, so that subsequent shots have a parent. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0034 As a player, I want a Begin Hole X entry screen, so that I see the map, distance, and club picker before I take my first shot. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
▶ EPIC-0005 Round Tracking Planned 14 stories · click to expand $7,200 $2.95 0 / 0
US-0035 As a player, I want the active hole map view to show my shot trail, so that I can see where I've been and where the pin is. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0036 As a player, I want to capture my GPS position when I take a shot, so that the system knows where I hit from. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0037 As a player, I want four outcome buttons after I hit a shot, so that I can record what happened. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0038 As a player, I want to choose where my rehit comes from after OOB, so that the recorded GPS origin is accurate. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0039 As a player, I want Mulligan to not count as a stroke, so that I can reshoot without penalty. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0040 As a player, I want Shot Sunk to close the hole for me, so that the hole score is recorded and the turn moves on. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0041 As a player, I want to edit any prior shot in this round, so that I can correct mistakes without admin help. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0042 As a player, I want the foursome turn picker to auto-select the next player by farthest from pin, so that the team plays in golf order without thinking. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0043 As a player, I want a hole summary after all teammates hole out, so that I can see who scored what and our team total. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0044 As a player, I want to move to the next hole, so that play continues smoothly. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0045 As a player, I want a "Hole X of 18" pill, so that I can see tournament progress regardless of which physical hole I'm on. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0046 As a player, I want my round automatically marked complete when all 18 holes are scored, so that I'm not stuck in an "active" state. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0047 As a player, I want manual coordinate entry if GPS permission is denied, so that I can still record shots. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0048 As a player, I want distances shown as approximate, so that I'm not misled by GPS accuracy limits. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
▶ EPIC-0006 Scoring Engine Planned 7 stories · click to expand $3,200 $1.47 0 / 0
US-0049 As a developer, I want a PostgreSQL function calc_best_ball_for_hole, so that team scoring is computed server-side consistently. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0050 As a developer, I want a DB trigger on hole_scores that upserts team_hole_scores, so that team totals stay in sync without app-side bookkeeping. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0051 As a developer, I want score-vs-par helpers, so that the leaderboard can show "-2 to par" without app-side math. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0052 As a developer, I want a team_standings SQL view, so that the leaderboard query is a single fetch. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0053 As a developer, I want provisional vs final status to be deterministic, so that the leaderboard never disagrees with the round. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0054 As a developer, I want test coverage of Best Ball edge cases, so that scoring bugs don't blow up the tournament. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0055 As a player, I want provisional team scores shown distinctly on the leaderboard, so that I know which holes aren't fully scored yet. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
▶ EPIC-0007 Leaderboard Planned 9 stories · click to expand $3,600 $1.89 0 / 0
US-0056 As a spectator, I want a public leaderboard URL at /t/{slug}/leaderboard, so that I can follow the tournament without logging in. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0057 As a player, I want my team's position prominent on the post-login leaderboard, so that I can see how we're doing at a glance. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0058 As a player, I want a LIVE indicator on the leaderboard, so that I trust the data is fresh. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0059 As a player, I want the leaderboard to update in real time, so that I see new scores as they come in. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0060 As a player, I want leaderboard updates coalesced, so that the UI doesn't thrash during heavy scoring activity. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0061 As a player, I want polling fallback when websocket fails, so that I'm not stuck with stale data. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0062 As a player, I want to drill into a team to see their hole-by-hole scores, so that I can see how they're playing. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0063 As a player, I want personal data hidden on the public view, so that my privacy is respected. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0064 As a spectator, I want a clear indication when the tournament is paused, so that I understand the standings might not be live. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
▶ EPIC-0008 Admin Operations Planned 12 stories · click to expand $5,600 $2.52 0 / 0
US-0065 As an admin, I want a persistent left sidebar layout, so that I can navigate quickly between sections. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0066 As an admin, I want 4 KPI stat cards on the dashboard, so that I can monitor tournament health at a glance. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0067 As an admin, I want a live rounds table with pace warnings, so that I can chase slow groups before they back up the course. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0068 As an admin, I want to search and filter players, so that I can find specific people fast. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0069 As an admin, I want to edit player profiles, so that I can fix mistakes and reset passwords. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0070 As an admin, I want to delete a player with confirmation, so that I can clean up test accounts. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0071 As an admin, I want to drill into a round and edit any shot, so that I can resolve disputes. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0072 As an admin, I want the audit trail visible per shot, so that I can defend score changes. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0073 As an admin, I want to assign and reassign players to teams, so that late changes can be made. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0074 As an admin, I want to manage the master club list with drag-to-reorder, so that I can keep it tidy. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0075 As an admin, I want sync issues flagged automatically, so that I can intervene without spotting them manually. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0076 As an admin, I want a list of all tournaments, so that I can switch context between events. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
▶ EPIC-0009 Offline & Sync Planned 6 stories · click to expand $3,200 $1.26 0 / 0
US-0077 As a developer, I want IndexedDB set up via idb library, so that the shot queue has a reliable client storage layer. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0078 As a player, I want shots written to IndexedDB first, so that no data is lost when the network drops. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0079 As a player, I want a visible offline indicator with queue depth, so that I know when sync is pending. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0080 As a player, I want my queue to drain on reconnect with newer-wins resolution, so that my latest edits stick. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0081 As an admin, I want my edits to always win over client edits, so that disputes don't get overwritten by stale offline queues. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0082 As a tester, I want an offline manual test pass, so that I'm confident the queue actually works on iOS Safari and Android Chrome. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
▶ EPIC-0010 Security & 2FA Planned 7 stories · click to expand $3,600 $1.47 0 / 0
US-0083 As a player, I want to enroll in 2FA via SMS, so that my account is more secure. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0084 As a player, I want a 2FA challenge on login, so that password compromise alone isn't enough to access my account. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0085 As an admin, I want to force 2FA per player, so that high-privilege accounts must enroll. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0086 As an admin, I want a log of sensitive admin actions, so that I can audit changes after the fact. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0087 As a player, I want to flag a hole score for dispute, so that I can request a review without admin help. Planned M $800.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0088 As a developer, I want stronger password rules, so that accounts are harder to compromise. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
US-0089 As a player, I want real emails for invites and password reset, so that I can use the app outside dev mode. Planned S $400.00 $0.21 0 / 0
Totals $41,600 $18.72 989,608 / 373,545

Milestones
EPIC-0001Foundation & Infrastructure
Est. $4,000 USD AI spend $1.68 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0001As a developer, I want a Next.js 14 App Router project scaffolded with TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Supabase client, so that all subsequent epics can build on a consistent foundation.
Planned
AC-0001Next.js 14 App Router project boots locally with `npm run dev` and renders a placeholder page
AC-0002TypeScript strict mode enabled; `tsconfig.json` extends Next.js defaults
AC-0003Tailwind CSS configured with PostCSS pipeline; sample utility class renders
AC-0004shadcn/ui CLI initialized; `components/ui` directory exists with at least Button installed
AC-0005`@supabase/ssr` and `@supabase/supabase-js` installed; browser + server client factories in `lib/supabase/`
AC-0006`.env.local.example` documents `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`, `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN`
○
US-0002As a developer, I want a Supabase project provisioned with PostgreSQL and email auth enabled, so that we have a backend ready for schema migrations and authentication.
Planned
AC-0007Supabase project created (cloud or local via `supabase start`)
AC-0008Email + password auth provider enabled in Supabase Auth settings
AC-0009Project URL and anon key documented in `.env.local`
AC-0010`supabase/config.toml` checked into repo for reproducible local dev
○
US-0003As a player, I want the FDgolf — built with AI/RUN app chrome on every authenticated page, so that the brand identity is consistent across the entire app.
Planned
AC-0011`AppChrome` component renders dark forest-green (#0e2818) header bar
AC-0012Header displays "FDgolf" with green "FD" mark (#6ee7a0) and white "golf"
AC-0013Header displays "built with AI/RUN" tagline with AI/RUN logo on the right
AC-0014AppChrome is responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
AC-0015Used in the root `app/layout.tsx` so all routes inherit it
○
US-0004As a player, I want to log in with email and password and stay logged in across page navigation, so that I don't have to re-authenticate constantly during my round.
Planned
AC-0016`/login` page renders email + password form with FDgolf branding
AC-0017Successful login redirects to intended route (default `/`)
AC-0018Failed login displays an error message without exposing whether the email exists
AC-0019Session persists via cookies set by Supabase SSR client
AC-0020`/logout` route clears the session and redirects to `/login`
AC-0021Next.js middleware refreshes the session on every request
○
US-0005As a developer, I want the complete DB schema migrated, so that all subsequent feature work has the tables it needs.
Planned
AC-0022Migration creates tables: tournaments, courses, holes, players, user_roles, tournament_registrations, teams, rounds, shots, shot_edits, shot_attestations, hole_scores, team_hole_scores, clubs, tournament_clubs, score_disputes
AC-0023All enums defined: tournament_format, tournament_start_style, tournament_status, role_type, registration_status, round_status, shot_outcome, rehit_origin_type, hole_score_status, club_type, dispute_status
AC-0024Foreign keys and unique constraints match the data model in design spec section 4
AC-0025`teams.team_size` int column with check constraint (2 <= team_size <= 5)
AC-0026`shots.updated_at` defaults to now() and triggers update on row change
AC-0027Migration runs cleanly on a fresh database via `supabase db reset`
○
US-0006As a developer, I want Row Level Security policies enforced on every table, so that tournament data is isolated and roles are respected.
Planned
AC-0028RLS enabled on every table created in US-0005
AC-0029Public read on tournaments, team_hole_scores, clubs (drives the public leaderboard and registration landing)
AC-0030Players can read self + own team members; admin bypass exists
AC-0031Players can write shots only during own round
AC-0032tournament_organizer scoped to their tournament_id
AC-0033Public payload on team_hole_scores includes player name + company only (no email, phone, year_of_birth, gender)
AC-0034SQL tests verify each policy with a non-privileged JWT
○
US-0007As a player, I want a Mapbox map ready to render in the app, so that round tracking can show me my position and the hole pin.
Planned
AC-0035`mapbox-gl` and `react-map-gl` installed
AC-0036`MapView` component renders a Mapbox map centred on a passed-in lat/lng
AC-0037Custom golf-course-style URL configurable via env var with sensible default
AC-0038Component renders without errors when used in a Client Component
AC-0039Mapbox token loaded from `NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN` env var; missing token shows a friendly fallback message instead of crashing
○
US-0008As an admin, I want the master club list seeded with a standard golf bag, so that tournaments can use it out of the box.
Planned
AC-0040Seed migration inserts 15 standard clubs: Driver, 3-wood, 5-wood, 3-hybrid, 4–9 iron, PW, GW, SW, LW, Putter
AC-0041Each club has `club_type`, `default_loft_degrees` (except Putter), `display_order`, `is_active=true`
AC-0042Display order matches a real golfer's bag traversal (Driver → wedges → Putter)
AC-0043Seed is idempotent (re-running does not create duplicates)
EPIC-0002Tournament Setup (Admin)
Est. $5,200 USD AI spend $2.52 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0009As an admin, I want to create a tournament with basic info, so that registration and play can be configured around it.
Planned
AC-0044Form fields: name (req), starts_at date+time (req), venue (req), format (req, defaults Best Ball), start_style (req, defaults shotgun), holes_count (req, defaults 18)
AC-0045On submit, tournament is created with status=draft
AC-0046Slug auto-generated from name (lowercase, hyphens, ascii-only)
○
US-0010As an admin, I want to override the auto-generated slug, so that the public URL matches the printed invitations.
Planned
AC-0047Slug field is editable on the basics step of the wizard
AC-0048Uniqueness check runs on blur; conflict shows inline error
AC-0049Only lowercase letters, digits, hyphens accepted
○
US-0011As an admin, I want to enter par, yardage, and stroke index for each hole, so that the scoring engine and round map have the data they need.
Planned
AC-0050Course holes table renders one editable row per hole (1 to holes_count)
AC-0051Par values constrained to 3, 4, 5
AC-0052Stroke indices constrained to 1–18, unique within the course
AC-0053Total par computed and displayed at the bottom
AC-0054Save persists rows to the `holes` table linked to the tournament's course
○
US-0012As an admin, I want a Granite Ridge GC preset to one-tap import, so that I don't hand-key 18 rows for the first tournament.
Planned
AC-0055"Import preset" button shows a list of available presets (at least Granite Ridge GC)
AC-0056Importing populates the 18-hole table with par, yardage, stroke index
AC-0057Admin can then edit any value before saving
○
US-0013As an admin, I want to drop pin coordinates for each hole on a satellite map, so that the round tracking app can compute distance-to-pin.
Planned
AC-0058Satellite map renders for each hole at a sensible default zoom around the course
AC-0059Click on the map drops a pin; coordinates saved to holes.pin_lat / pin_lng
AC-0060Tee coordinates can also be dropped (separate mode)
AC-0061Progress bar shows N of 18 holes with pins set
AC-0062"Save and continue to next hole" button auto-advances
AC-0063Holes table shows pin status (Set or Missing) per hole
○
US-0014As a player, I want a Mapbox Static API PNG snapshot stored per hole, so that distance-to-pin works even if the Mapbox tile API is rate-limited mid-round.
Planned
AC-0064On pin save, a request is made to Mapbox Static API for the hole region
AC-0065PNG is uploaded to Supabase Storage in `course-maps/{courseId}/hole-{n}.png`
AC-0066`holes.static_map_url` populated with the public URL
○
US-0015As an admin, I want to pick which clubs from the master list are available in this tournament, so that I can enforce sponsor-supplied bags or simplified club lists.
Planned
AC-0067All master clubs listed with toggle controls; defaults to all-active
AC-0068Disabled clubs are excluded from the player's bag picker in pre-round setup
○
US-0016As an admin, I want CIBC tournament sponsor logos (First Derivative, AI/Run) hardcoded for the first tournament, so that the public leaderboard ships on schedule.
Planned
AC-0069Logos shipped as static assets in `public/sponsors/`
AC-0070Tournament with slug `cibc-arc-2024` (or current first tournament's slug) shows both logos on public leaderboard
AC-0071Tournaments with other slugs show no sponsor logos until admin upload UI ships in Phase 2
○
US-0017As an admin, I want a pre-flight checklist before activation, so that I don't open registration on a misconfigured tournament.
Planned
AC-0072Checklist shows green checks for: basics complete, all holes configured (par 72 or expected), all 18 pin coordinates set, slug verified unique
AC-0073Checklist shows amber reminders for: clubs configured, teams unassigned
AC-0074Activate button disabled until all green checks pass
AC-0075Live preview card shows what the public leaderboard banner will look like
○
US-0018As an admin, I want buttons to move the tournament between statuses, so that I can open registration, start play, and close the tournament cleanly.
Planned
AC-0076From draft, "Open registration" moves status to registration_open
AC-0077From registration_open, "Start tournament" moves status to active
AC-0078From active, "Complete tournament" moves status to completed
AC-0079Paused status reachable via DB direct update; no UI in Phase 1
AC-0080Transitions are logged with timestamp and admin actor
○
US-0019As an admin, I want the public registration URL displayed after activation, so that I can copy-paste it into the invite emails.
Planned
AC-0081Post-activation confirmation screen shows the URL `fdgolf.app/register/{slug}`
AC-0082Copy-to-clipboard button
○
US-0020As an admin, I want to promote a player to tournament_organizer for a specific tournament, so that ops responsibility can be delegated without granting global admin.
Planned
AC-0083Admin can search any player and click "Make organizer" for a tournament
AC-0084user_roles row inserted with role=tournament_organizer and tournament_id=this_tournament
AC-0085Organizer can perform admin actions only on rows where tournament_id matches their role's tournament_id
EPIC-0003Registration & Profile
Est. $4,000 USD AI spend $1.89 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0021As a player, I want a tournament-branded invite landing page, so that I know what I'm signing up for before I start the form.
Planned
AC-0086Route `/register/{slug}` resolves the tournament from the slug
AC-0087Tournament name, venue, date, format displayed
AC-0088Sponsor logos visible (if configured)
AC-0089"Register" CTA and "I have an account" link
○
US-0022As a player, I want to enter my personal info, so that the system knows who I am and how to contact me.
Planned
AC-0090Required fields: full name, title, company, email, mobile phone
AC-0091Optional fields explicitly labelled: year of birth (opt), gender (opt with prefer-not-to-say)
AC-0092Email format and phone format validated client-side and server-side
AC-0093Form values persist across step navigation
○
US-0023As a player, I want to set a password with confirmation, so that I can log in next time.
Planned
AC-0094Two password fields with match validation
AC-0095Minimum 8 characters required in Phase 1 (Phase 2 strengthens)
AC-0096On submit, account created via Supabase Auth and player row inserted
AC-0097Player is auto-logged-in after account creation
○
US-0024As a player, I want to choose my team and search for foursome members, so that I'm grouped with my colleagues for play.
Planned
AC-0098Team number selector lists 1 to tournament max teams
AC-0099Member search returns existing registered players by name or email
AC-0100"Add member" can add placeholder rows for non-registered players (email-only)
AC-0101tournament_registrations row created with team_id linked
○
US-0025As a team captain, I want to register and assign all my team members in one flow, so that non-tech executives don't have to use the app themselves.
Planned
AC-0102During registration, player can check "I'm the team captain"
AC-0103Captain dashboard at /team/{teamId}/captain accessible post-login
AC-0104Captain can add new team members by name + email
AC-0105Each added member gets a signed invite link sent (stub email; logged to console in Phase 1)
AC-0106Invite link goes to a one-step "Set password" page with profile pre-filled by captain
○
US-0026As a developer, I want a signed invite link generator and verifier, so that captain-issued invites are tamper-proof.
Planned
AC-0107Generator produces a JWT signed with Supabase service role key containing player_id and team_id
AC-0108Verifier rejects expired (>14 days) and invalid signatures
AC-0109Email send is stubbed in Phase 1 (logged); real send wired in Phase 2
○
US-0027As a player, I want a profile page where I can view and edit my info, so that I can correct mistakes and see my tournament history.
Planned
AC-0110Route `/profile` shows current player's profile
AC-0111Editable: name, title, company, phone, year of birth, gender
AC-0112Read-only: email, handicap (Phase 2 edits handicap)
AC-0113Tournament history list (Phase 1 shows current tournament only)
○
US-0028As a player, I want to request a password reset link, so that I can recover my account if I forget my password.
Planned
AC-0114`/forgot-password` accepts email, calls Supabase Auth reset
AC-0115Confirmation shown ("Check your inbox") regardless of whether the email exists
AC-0116Reset link from email opens `/reset-password?token=...` page where new password can be set
○
US-0029As an admin, I want teams to support 2-, 3-, 4-, or 5-player sizes, so that drop-outs and oversized teams are handled cleanly.
Planned
AC-0117Team form has team_size selector 2-5 (default 4)
AC-0118Team detail UI says "Foursome" when team_size=4, "team of N" otherwise
AC-0119Best Ball calculation in EPIC-0006 uses actual team_size (not hardcoded 4)
EPIC-0004Pre-Round Setup
Est. $2,000 USD AI spend $1.05 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0030As a player, I want a tournament home page after I log in, so that I know my tee time, my team, and where to start.
Planned
AC-0120Countdown to starts_at displayed at top
AC-0121Team card with all members and their company
AC-0122Starting hole pin card with par, yardage
AC-0123"Start Round" primary CTA
AC-0124"View leaderboard" secondary link
○
US-0031As a player, I want to confirm or remove clubs from my bag before I start, so that the picker shows only clubs I actually have.
Planned
AC-0125Tournament club list rendered as toggleable chips
AC-0126Defaults all on
AC-0127Tap to remove (greys out)
AC-0128Bag selection persisted to the round record
○
US-0032As a player, I want to confirm who goes first, so that the team starts in the right order.
Planned
AC-0129"Going on first" defaults to current player
AC-0130"Change" button opens picker with team members
○
US-0033As a player, I want my round record created when I tap Start Round, so that subsequent shots have a parent.
Planned
AC-0131Inserts rounds row with status=in_progress, start_hole=tournament-assigned, started_at=now()
AC-0132Redirects to /round/{roundId} after creation
○
US-0034As a player, I want a Begin Hole X entry screen, so that I see the map, distance, and club picker before I take my first shot.
Planned
AC-0133Map view shows hole pin, my GPS location, tee marker
AC-0134Distance-to-pin displayed (approx prefix)
AC-0135Club picker shows tournament bag with smart default (Driver on tee, otherwise last-used)
AC-0136"Start shot — capture GPS" CTA
EPIC-0005Round Tracking
Est. $7,200 USD AI spend $2.95 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0035As a player, I want the active hole map view to show my shot trail, so that I can see where I've been and where the pin is.
Planned
AC-0137Map shows fairway base layer from cached Mapbox Static URL
AC-0138Hole pin marker rendered
AC-0139Tee marker rendered
AC-0140Prior shots rendered as dashed lines + numbered markers
AC-0141Current player position pulsed in red
AC-0142Distance-to-pin overlay top-left
○
US-0036As a player, I want to capture my GPS position when I take a shot, so that the system knows where I hit from.
Planned
AC-0143navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition called with high accuracy
AC-0144lat/lng captured to local state on Start Shot tap
AC-0145Selected club persisted with the shot draft
○
US-0037As a player, I want four outcome buttons after I hit a shot, so that I can record what happened.
Planned
AC-0146Four buttons: In Play (neutral green), Sunk (filled green), Mulligan (amber), OOB (red)
AC-0147In Play / Sunk / Mulligan tap inserts shots row with appropriate stroke_count (1 / 1 / 0)
AC-0148OOB tap triggers the OOB rehit prompt (US-0038)
○
US-0038As a player, I want to choose where my rehit comes from after OOB, so that the recorded GPS origin is accurate.
Planned
AC-0149Prompt offers "Rehit from OOB location" or "Rehit from prior position"
AC-0150OOB shot inserted with stroke_count=2 (1 for shot + 1 penalty)
AC-0151Follow-up shot's origin_lat/lng set to chosen rehit position
AC-0152rehit_from_shot_id and rehit_origin set on the follow-up shot
○
US-0039As a player, I want Mulligan to not count as a stroke, so that I can reshoot without penalty.
Planned
AC-0153Mulligan outcome inserts shot with stroke_count=0
AC-0154Next shot's origin defaults to same location
○
US-0040As a player, I want Shot Sunk to close the hole for me, so that the hole score is recorded and the turn moves on.
Planned
AC-0155Sunk outcome inserts shot with stroke_count=1
AC-0156Computes gross_score as sum of stroke_count on this hole
AC-0157Inserts/updates hole_scores row with status=provisional or final
AC-0158Triggers team_hole_scores recalc via EPIC-0006
○
US-0041As a player, I want to edit any prior shot in this round, so that I can correct mistakes without admin help.
Planned
AC-0159Tap a shot in the map or hole summary to open the edit panel
AC-0160Editable: club, outcome, GPS origin
AC-0161Before/after states recorded in shot_edits audit table
AC-0162shots.updated_at and updated_by set on save
AC-0163Hole scores recalculated if outcome or stroke_count changed
○
US-0042As a player, I want the foursome turn picker to auto-select the next player by farthest from pin, so that the team plays in golf order without thinking.
Planned
AC-0164After a shot is recorded, compute distance-to-pin for each team member's last unfinalized shot
AC-0165Auto-select the player with greatest distance
AC-0166Manual override available
AC-0167Players with sunk outcome on current hole excluded
AC-0168Works with team_size 2-5
○
US-0043As a player, I want a hole summary after all teammates hole out, so that I can see who scored what and our team total.
Planned
AC-0169Per-player gross score listed with par-relative annotation (e.g., "bogey", "+2")
AC-0170"BEST" badge on the contributing player whose score won the hole
AC-0171Team standing pre-loaded (current position out of N)
AC-0172"Next: Hole X" CTA where X is the next physical hole (handles shotgun start wrap)
○
US-0044As a player, I want to move to the next hole, so that play continues smoothly.
Planned
AC-0173Next advances to next physical hole accounting for 18-hole wrap from shotgun start
AC-0174New hole map renders; shot stream resets
○
US-0045As a player, I want a "Hole X of 18" pill, so that I can see tournament progress regardless of which physical hole I'm on.
Planned
AC-0175Pill shows holes completed by team (1-18) plus current hole
○
US-0046As a player, I want my round automatically marked complete when all 18 holes are scored, so that I'm not stuck in an "active" state.
Planned
AC-0176When all 18 hole_scores are final, rounds.status set to completed and completed_at set
AC-0177Player is shown a "Round complete" screen with final score
○
US-0047As a player, I want manual coordinate entry if GPS permission is denied, so that I can still record shots.
Planned
AC-0178If geolocation permission denied, show explanation and "Tap the map" instructions
AC-0179Click on the map sets the shot's origin coordinates manually
○
US-0048As a player, I want distances shown as approximate, so that I'm not misled by GPS accuracy limits.
Planned
AC-0180Display format "~245 yds to pin" with the approx prefix
AC-0181GPS accuracy (in metres) stored on the shot record (optional column)
EPIC-0006Scoring Engine
Est. $3,200 USD AI spend $1.47 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0049As a developer, I want a PostgreSQL function calc_best_ball_for_hole, so that team scoring is computed server-side consistently.
Planned
AC-0182Function signature: calc_best_ball_for_hole(p_team_id uuid, p_hole_number int) returns (best_score int, contributing_player_id uuid, status hole_score_status)
AC-0183Returns min gross_score across team members for the hole
AC-0184Status is final only when all team_size members have final hole_score for this hole
AC-0185SQL tests verify with 2-, 3-, 4-, 5-player teams
○
US-0050As a developer, I want a DB trigger on hole_scores that upserts team_hole_scores, so that team totals stay in sync without app-side bookkeeping.
Planned
AC-0186AFTER INSERT/UPDATE on hole_scores calls calc_best_ball_for_hole
AC-0187team_hole_scores row created or updated with returned values
AC-0188status (provisional/final) flows from the function result
○
US-0051As a developer, I want score-vs-par helpers, so that the leaderboard can show "-2 to par" without app-side math.
Planned
AC-0189SQL view returns per-hole and cumulative score-vs-par
AC-0190Handles missing holes (returns null cumulative until first hole completes)
○
US-0052As a developer, I want a team_standings SQL view, so that the leaderboard query is a single fetch.
Planned
AC-0191View aggregates team_hole_scores into total score, thru count, score-vs-par
AC-0192Sorted by score ascending, then thru descending
AC-0193Includes rank column with proper tied handling
○
US-0053As a developer, I want provisional vs final status to be deterministic, so that the leaderboard never disagrees with the round.
Planned
AC-0194hole_scores.status=final when player has outcome=sunk OR shot count on hole > 8 (auto-finalize blowout)
AC-0195team_hole_scores.status=final only when all team_size members have final hole_score for the hole
○
US-0054As a developer, I want test coverage of Best Ball edge cases, so that scoring bugs don't blow up the tournament.
Planned
AC-0196Tests cover variable team_size (2, 3, 4, 5)
AC-0197Mulligan shots (stroke_count=0) do not inflate scores
AC-0198OOB penalty stroke is correctly included in gross_score
AC-0199Withdrawn players excluded from team Best Ball calc
○
US-0055As a player, I want provisional team scores shown distinctly on the leaderboard, so that I know which holes aren't fully scored yet.
Planned
AC-0200team_hole_scores.status returned in leaderboard payload
AC-0201Client renders italic grey for provisional, solid for final
EPIC-0007Leaderboard
Est. $3,600 USD AI spend $1.89 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0056As a spectator, I want a public leaderboard URL at /t/{slug}/leaderboard, so that I can follow the tournament without logging in.
Planned
AC-0202SSR; renders fast first-paint
AC-0203Tournament header: name, venue, date, sponsor logos
AC-0204No auth required
AC-0205Basic Open Graph meta tags (og:title, og:description)
AC-0206Privacy guard: only name + company shown for players
○
US-0057As a player, I want my team's position prominent on the post-login leaderboard, so that I can see how we're doing at a glance.
Planned
AC-0207Hero card with green gradient pinned above the top-20 list
AC-0208Shows team #, members, current rank, score, thru count
AC-0209Shown regardless of where my team ranks
○
US-0058As a player, I want a LIVE indicator on the leaderboard, so that I trust the data is fresh.
Planned
AC-0210Red blinking pill when websocket connected
AC-0211"AUTO 30s" pill when polling-only
○
US-0059As a player, I want the leaderboard to update in real time, so that I see new scores as they come in.
Planned
AC-0212Client subscribes to Supabase Realtime channel tournament:{slug}
AC-0213Broadcasts on team_hole_scores changes only
AC-0214Reconnects on disconnect
○
US-0060As a player, I want leaderboard updates coalesced, so that the UI doesn't thrash during heavy scoring activity.
Planned
AC-0215Multiple incoming events within 5s coalesce into one render
AC-0216Uses requestAnimationFrame for batching
○
US-0061As a player, I want polling fallback when websocket fails, so that I'm not stuck with stale data.
Planned
AC-0217If websocket fails or stays disconnected >10s, switch to 30s polling
AC-0218Resume websocket when it comes back available
○
US-0062As a player, I want to drill into a team to see their hole-by-hole scores, so that I can see how they're playing.
Planned
AC-0219Tap team row opens detail view
AC-02209-hole strip x 2 (front and back nine)
AC-0221Rows: par, best score per hole
AC-0222Birdies+ highlighted gold
AC-0223Provisional scores italic grey
○
US-0063As a player, I want personal data hidden on the public view, so that my privacy is respected.
Planned
AC-0224Public leaderboard payload omits email, phone, year_of_birth, gender
AC-0225Server-side filter enforced (not client-side)
○
US-0064As a spectator, I want a clear indication when the tournament is paused, so that I understand the standings might not be live.
Planned
AC-0226When tournaments.status=paused, banner shows "Tournament paused"
AC-0227LIVE pill disabled; data still visible
EPIC-0008Admin Operations
Est. $5,600 USD AI spend $2.52 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0065As an admin, I want a persistent left sidebar layout, so that I can navigate quickly between sections.
Planned
AC-0228Sidebar with 8 items: Dashboard, Tournaments, Players, Teams, Scores, Courses, Clubs, Stats
AC-0229Items grouped (operational vs setup)
AC-0230Current section highlighted
AC-0231Route-protected to admin role
○
US-0066As an admin, I want 4 KPI stat cards on the dashboard, so that I can monitor tournament health at a glance.
Planned
AC-0232Players card shows registered count and recent delta
AC-0233Teams playing card shows in_progress rounds count
AC-0234Avg pace card shows computed minutes-per-hole vs target
AC-0235Sync issues card shows count and team numbers
AC-0236Auto-refresh every 30s
○
US-0067As an admin, I want a live rounds table with pace warnings, so that I can chase slow groups before they back up the course.
Planned
AC-0237Table shows all in_progress rounds with team, players, thru, score, pace
AC-0238Rows where pace exceeds target by more than 2 min/hole highlighted amber
AC-0239Pace target configurable per tournament (default 12 min/hole)
AC-0240Click row to view the team's round
○
US-0068As an admin, I want to search and filter players, so that I can find specific people fast.
Planned
AC-0241Server-side search by name, email, or company
AC-0242Chip filters: Unassigned, No 2FA, by company
AC-0243Pagination at 50 per page
AC-0244Row actions: Edit, Reset PW, Delete
○
US-0069As an admin, I want to edit player profiles, so that I can fix mistakes and reset passwords.
Planned
AC-0245Edit modal with all profile fields
AC-0246Reset PW sends Supabase Auth recovery email
AC-0247Force-2FA toggle (Phase 2 enforcement)
○
US-0070As an admin, I want to delete a player with confirmation, so that I can clean up test accounts.
Planned
AC-0248Soft delete; preserves shot history for audit
AC-0249Player marked withdrawn in registration
AC-0250Confirmation dialog required
○
US-0071As an admin, I want to drill into a round and edit any shot, so that I can resolve disputes.
Planned
AC-0251Round detail page shows holes 1-18 with shot lists
AC-0252Each shot row is editable: club, outcome, GPS, distance
AC-0253Save persists shot_edits audit row with admin actor
AC-0254Hole scores and team_hole_scores recompute via trigger
○
US-0072As an admin, I want the audit trail visible per shot, so that I can defend score changes.
Planned
AC-0255Shot edit panel shows all changes with timestamp and author
AC-0256Admin edits shown amber for visual distinction
○
US-0073As an admin, I want to assign and reassign players to teams, so that late changes can be made.
Planned
AC-0257Player row has team selector (dropdown or drag-drop)
AC-0258team_size respected on assignment
AC-0259Unassigned pool shown separately
○
US-0074As an admin, I want to manage the master club list with drag-to-reorder, so that I can keep it tidy.
Planned
AC-0260Drag handles on each row
AC-0261Toggle active per club
AC-0262Edit display name, loft
AC-0263Soft delete on remove
○
US-0075As an admin, I want sync issues flagged automatically, so that I can intervene without spotting them manually.
Planned
AC-0264Round flagged sync_issue when no shot insert AND no GPS heartbeat for >10 min during active round AND current hole not marked complete
AC-0265Background job (or cron RPC) updates a sync_issue field on rounds
AC-0266Dashboard KPI card shows count; click to drill in
○
US-0076As an admin, I want a list of all tournaments, so that I can switch context between events.
Planned
AC-0267List shows all tournaments with name, date, status pill
AC-0268Filter by status
AC-0269Click enters tournament context (sets active tournament in admin session)
EPIC-0009Offline & Sync
Est. $3,200 USD AI spend $1.26 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0077As a developer, I want IndexedDB set up via idb library, so that the shot queue has a reliable client storage layer.
Planned
AC-0270idb library installed
AC-0271Versioned schema with shots store (key=tempId)
AC-0272Database opens on app boot
○
US-0078As a player, I want shots written to IndexedDB first, so that no data is lost when the network drops.
Planned
AC-0273Every shot insert writes IndexedDB first with status=pending
AC-0274Background process drains pending shots to Supabase
AC-0275On Supabase success, IndexedDB row status=synced
○
US-0079As a player, I want a visible offline indicator with queue depth, so that I know when sync is pending.
Planned
AC-0276Banner appears when navigator.onLine=false
AC-0277Banner shows queue depth (e.g., "3 shots queued")
AC-0278Auto-dismisses when online and queue is empty
○
US-0080As a player, I want my queue to drain on reconnect with newer-wins resolution, so that my latest edits stick.
Planned
AC-0279Online event triggers queue drain
AC-0280Upsert by id; server compares updated_at and rejects older
AC-0281Rejected upserts logged to dev console for debugging
○
US-0081As an admin, I want my edits to always win over client edits, so that disputes don't get overwritten by stale offline queues.
Planned
AC-0282Admin edit sets updated_by=admin_id and updated_at=now()
AC-0283Server-side trigger rejects any subsequent client upsert with older updated_at
○
US-0082As a tester, I want an offline manual test pass, so that I'm confident the queue actually works on iOS Safari and Android Chrome.
Planned
AC-0284Test matrix documented: iOS 16/17/18 x Safari/Chrome x foreground/background mid-shot x airplane-mode toggle
AC-0285Each cell run manually with pass/fail captured
AC-0286Failures opened as BUGs in BUGS.md
EPIC-0010Security & 2FA
Est. $3,600 USD AI spend $1.47 USD
0% Planned ►
Stories
○
US-0083As a player, I want to enroll in 2FA via SMS, so that my account is more secure.
Planned
AC-0287Profile page has "Enable 2FA" CTA
AC-0288SMS sent to registered phone with verification code
AC-0289Code verification enrolls the factor in Supabase Auth
○
US-0084As a player, I want a 2FA challenge on login, so that password compromise alone isn't enough to access my account.
Planned
AC-0290When factor exists, login prompts for SMS code after password
AC-0291"Remember this device" option for 30 days
○
US-0085As an admin, I want to force 2FA per player, so that high-privilege accounts must enroll.
Planned
AC-0292Admin toggle on player edit screen
AC-0293Next login forces enrollment before accessing the app
○
US-0086As an admin, I want a log of sensitive admin actions, so that I can audit changes after the fact.
Planned
AC-0294admin_audit_log table created
AC-0295Records every admin action with target, before/after, timestamp
AC-0296Admin can view audit log filtered by date or actor
○
US-0087As a player, I want to flag a hole score for dispute, so that I can request a review without admin help.
Planned
AC-0297Round summary has a "Dispute" button per hole
AC-0298Dispute creates a score_disputes row with reason text
AC-0299tournament_organizer sees disputes queue
AC-0300Resolve or dismiss closes the dispute with a note
○
US-0088As a developer, I want stronger password rules, so that accounts are harder to compromise.
Planned
AC-0301Min 12 chars, mixed case, number, symbol
AC-0302Strength meter on password fields
AC-0303Server-side validation matches client rules
○
US-0089As a player, I want real emails for invites and password reset, so that I can use the app outside dev mode.
Planned
AC-0304SMTP integration (Resend or AWS SES) configured
AC-0305Branded HTML templates for invite, password reset, 2FA codes
AC-0306Email send logs captured for support

Settings

Changes are auto-saved to browser storage as you type. To make them permanent, click Copy config JSON and paste the result into plan-visualizer.config.json at your project root.

GitHub Issues Sync

Enabled
Sync bugs Sync stories
Token (GITHUB_TOKEN env var)
✗ Not set — only needed if you want to sync bugs/stories to GitHub Issues. Set it with: export GITHUB_TOKEN=<your-token> in your shell before running node tools/generate-plan.js

—

Memory

Configures how stale memory files are archived. See docs/memory/ and tools/memory.js.

Default: 90 days; auto-archive off. Edit plan-visualizer.config.json → memory block to persist.
